Review_Text: we got the khao soi and the Penang curry and both were super tasty!!!! really enjoyed our meal and definitely worth a visit. the staff and especially the owner was super helpful when they saw I had lost my bag, contacted the taxi for me and waited until I got it back. they went out of their way to help me and I’m truly truly grateful. amazing food and amazing staff!!!! highly recommend

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Had my first and the best Khao Soi here. The food is halal, and they have veg-vegan options as well. Polite and friendly staff, the service is very quick. We asked them to make the Khao soi spicy, and a chilli paste was provided, which is mind blowing. Can’t wait to be back in Chiang Mai to eat here again.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
Found a nice restaurant in Nimman, Chiang Mai with great vegetarian options.
The food is delicious, the place is simple and clean, and the staff are friendly.
Highly recommend for anyone looking for a vegetarian-friendly spot in Chiang Mai!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
Recommended for vegetarians. They have a dedicated menu for vegans.

It is a pity that the portions were too small for us, compared to other restaurants, so the value is not great.

The food was very tasty, full of flavours and they have more chilli if you like it spicy.

The service was kind and the atmosphere very relaxed, we ate inside were they have good air-con. The decoration was nice.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Incredible tom yum kung and mango sticky rice. It made my eyes close in delight! The staff were lovely.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: I recently dined in here and absolutely loved the food. Everything was so delicious that I ended up ordering take home. I kept the food in the freezer, and when I reheated them later, the food was still incredibly  flavorful. Highly recommended!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: I tried the stir fried mushrooms noodles and it was really flavourful. The panang curry that my partner had was really tasty as well, but his portion was quite small, maybe due to the fancy plate they used, not sure. It's a pity because he would have loved to have a bit more of that delicious dish. The decoration of the walls it's really interesting!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: This was the best Thai food we had in the whole of Nimman. Super fresh, amazing quality and freshly cooked, not too oily or greasy, and the flavours were amazing. Lots of veggie and vegan options too and the price is good for what you get. Cute little restaurant too with nice interior - and they do a cooking class! You have to come here if you're in Nimman its so so good - we came here pretty much every day when we stayed.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Great choice! Really enjoyed every single dish that we ordered! The fish was fresh n nicely done! Somtam was not sweet n just nice. Love the omelette with crab meat, morning glory and Penang curry, sweet n sour squid with fresh cucumber,  pineapple etc. All the dishes came out pretty fast. And we ended with the delicious mango sticky rice! Highly recommended halal Thai food! Just one thing , they only accept cash n my QR code didn't work.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: "Double the price half the size" is the slogan of this restaurant. Taste is good, but the portion size is laughable considering the price and the fact that this is not a fine dining restaurant. Do not believe the great reviews.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
Visiting from Seattle, USA!
The nearby night market didn't have much vegetarian food, so we stopped in, and had an amazing meal!
The green curry was made with fresh tofu that was so delicious, and the papaya salad was refreshing and crunchy. Absolutely lovely. Thai tea was the best we've had yet on our trip, and we both loved the durian sticky rice!
I would love to learn to cook from these wonderful people, their food is lovely.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
Very very delicious vegan Thai food!
We ordered half the menu and everything was just great. I highly recommend coming here.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Absolutely love this cosy place with amazing food and drinks! Reasonable price, fresh ingredients, lovely food presentation and very clean place. This place can top any of other famous/instagrammable/viral Thai restaurants here. They also hosts free cooking classes here. Will certainly come back in my next visit to Chiang Mai

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: This place is seriously good! 😍 Secret tip: If you ask for it, they serve amazing Vegetarian Khao Soi with mushrooms, even though it‘s not on the menu. 🌱 The food is genuinely great, at the staff very friendly! I can only recommend. 😊

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: The best Khao Soi in Chiang Mai! It is always fresh and super tasty, especially the broth, super creamy, like nowhere else! Portion size is great value for the price! I have eaten here multiple times during my stay and they have never disappointed me, really great place to taste local food! I recommend!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
Repeated this place twice during our trip in Chiang Mai because everything was so good!
This is a new halal place in Chiang Mai city. Their Tom Yum Kung was flavorful and good. We also ordered papaya salad, green curry, omelette, chicken cashew and etc, Great service from the waiter and owner. We got complimentary fruit on both of our visits.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Amazing food! Especially the veggie was so delicious and spicy, so good.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: THE BEST FOOD EVER! We ate here twice throughout our 5 days visit in Chiang Mai. They served the best tomyum kung ever! Actually all the dishes that we tried were really good! The highlights will be tomyum kung and papaya salad 🔥🔥🔥 all staff are nice and helpful. Always assisted us with everything that we need. Plus they serve halal meat 🫶🏻🫶🏻 they also gave us free fruits  with little umbrella and orchids.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: My family decided to go to this restaurant because sign told that Thai Halal& Vegan foods.My family mostly like this type of food.All of the price are reasonable.Taste of meal was delicious.Services was good.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: We had sweet and sour seabass, curry prawn and papaya salad. They’re delicious. Nice ambience and courteous staff. It was a pleasant culinary fare.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
food, location and atmosphere was fantastic! staff was really friendly and warm too. food was hearty and homey. did not know what to expect for the khao soi cause i've never tried it before. AND NOW, i think i found my new favourite thai food other than pad thai hehe.

Payment - BRING CASH. it seems like many food places do not accept cards.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: My wife, daughter and I tried their cooking course where you prepare a meal of your choosing from the menu. It was so much fun! They had all the ingredients prepped as they instructed every step of cooking the meal, enabling a disgraceful cook such as myself to make some delicious pad Thai!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: กินมื้อเย็นที่ร้านมรกฎเป็นร้านอาหารตามสั่งที่มีเมนูหลากหลาย ที่สั่งมาทานเป็นแกงเขียวหวานไก่รสชาตดีแกงเข้มข้นสั่งแบบไม่เผ็ดมาก ตามด้วยแกงคั่วสัปรดกุ้งสดมากเมนูที่3เป็นปลากะพงนึ่งมะนาวปลาสดรสชาติดีที่เดียวถ้ามาแถวนิมมานเหมินทร์ เชียงใหม่ ใกล้ซอย6มาชิมกันดูครับ

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Yummy halal chicken khao soi and Thai tea with the perfect amount of sweetness.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: 3 kali makan sini sebab paling dekat dalam town. In between 7eleven & mcdonald. I'm not sure if this is the one & only halal eatery in town. the food is a bit pricey but nice. Air je limited choices.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: The best Pad Thai in the city! Wow, so delicious! Also the "Stir fried Morning Glory" was so tasty, healthy veggies. Good vegan options also. I definitely recommend based on my experience 😊

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
Ordered Tofu Green Curry and steamed rice. Some of the best I’ve had in Thailand. Staff are super kind also.

Very accommodating of Vegan!

Definitely recommend!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: If you’re Vegan or Vegetarian this a must try while in Nimman. Everything is very delicious and of good quality ingredients. I highly suggest the Kai Soi & the Morning Glory. Yummy smoothies without any sugar. Very good and well priced. Highly recommend.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
อาหารไทยฮาลาลรสชาติดีมาก เครื่องเทศถึง อร่อยแบบไม่ต้องปรุงเพิ่ม
ร้านสะอาด บรรยากาศสบาย เจ้าของร้านบริการเป็นกันเอง

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: If you are looking for the best Halal thai food in chiang mai this is the place !

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: We were here on our first night in Chiang Mai. It was absolutely worth it! We had the fish, seafood tomyum, chicken mango sticky rice, papaya salad it was super delicious! It was all very quick too. Would definitely recommend anyone to come here!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Very quick and tasty. The waitress had a beautiful Thai dress showcasing the culture.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Very delicious Thai food in ChangMai next to our resort, Streamed Sea Bass with lemon,  Tom Yum noddle & Morning Glory is the best choice, highly recommended!!!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: A lovely little find which satisfied the vegan belly. In the words of General MacArthur, “I will return”.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: The food here is great and the staff pleasant and very friendly and attentive. They even have free cooking classes and you buy the food you cook! In 30 mins I  learned to cook 2 simple dishes. The morning Glory stir fry and the Chicken and Cashew nut stir fry........they got me chopping and actually stir frying! I'll definitely come back again!🙂👍🏿

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: มีเพือนแนะนำให้มาลองเมนูนี้ มาม่าต้มยำสุดยอดมากเลยค่ะ เราตบท้ายด้วยขนมปังหน้ากุ้ง เมนูนี้ก็เริ่ดกว่า

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Excellent, high quality halal Thai food! Would recommend the chicken in coconut milk soup and crab meat fried rice. Friendly staff. Cash only.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Fantastic Thai food. Fresh and beautiful presentation. Highly recommended

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Another tasty halal dinner in Chiang Mai! Phad Thai, Mango Sticky Rice, and many more are all on point!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Not a good pad thai at all, very saucy and probably the worst I had. the khao soi here is better but pricier :/

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: More Rar Kot is a vegan-friendly pescatarian restaurant on Nimman. My yellow curry dish was excellent!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
Authentic Thai Cuisine, halal and delicious food.
Fish both crispy and steam very good.
Their signature - shrimp toast is a must!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
The staff was very lovely, and the decor is beautiful.

The food, however, was not great. I ordered the mushroom omelette. It did not sit well in my stomach; my guess is maybe it’s cooked in a low quality oil that upset my stomach.

I thought the sign advertising was a bit misleading; I was expecting healthier options.

Also a bit over priced in my opinion, but given its location, i suppose it’s competitive.

I will not be returning but I wish them the best and I hope they use healthier ingredients next time to satisfy their customers.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: The best veggie Khoa Soy we’ve eaten in Thailand! (And we’ve had a fair few). Great atmosphere with glamorous green wallpaper.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: The staff are really nice but this is really just double priced thai food with better signage and nicer air conditioning…

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Have the seafood Khou suouy, veg spring rolls and papaya salad, make sure to add all the toppings provided with the khou suouy!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
Excellent, delicious halal Thai food.
Fast service.
Highly recommended!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: I came to this restaurant and the food was really good. Everything tasted so good, and I truly enjoyed my meal. I would definitely come back again.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Delicious pad thai and incredibly warm and kind service. 🤍 thank you!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Food was great first time in Thailand someone actually asked if I enjoyed the food so 5*s all round very reasonable curry was great

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: We enjoyed this place very much on our visit from the USA and we will be back next time we are in Chiang Mai! The green curry and panang curry were so delicious and the staff were very helpful and friendly.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
Great vegetarian and vegan options, as well as the normal meat/fish Thai fare.

We stayed in the area for a month and came here regularly as my partner is vegetarian. Our favourites were the Khao Soi, mushroom omelette and papaya salad (all vegetarian and low spicy). The service is always fast and with a smile. It’s a little more expensive than ‘grandma’ type street food Thai,l food, but the quality and portions make up for that.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Foods and services are excellent.All employee was excellent too. Overall is excellent

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Super delicious Thai food! Tried their khao soi and tom yum, all are really tasty! Has halal certification to top it off.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: The food was soo good! The best Pad Thai I've eaten in Thailand until now! And the workers were super nice :))

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: The deep fried sweet and sour tofu and tofu with cashew nuts are amazing. Great for vegetarians!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Tasty PadThai. Nice Place and Good Service.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: My foreign friend recommended me to go with him and went to eat this restaurant.Taste of food was great. The services were great too.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Cannot emphasize how good this food was. If you’re not eating here, you’re missing out. Ordered the sea bass, chicken panang curry, papaya salad, vegetarian khao soi. The sea bass was a particular favorite of mine. Service was wonderful. The owner was very amenable to requests from vegan members of our party who asked for no fish sauce or egg in the khao soi. Everything was incredibly flavorful and I will dream about this food for the foreseeable future.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: I came here for a meal and the food was good and satisfying. Everything was well prepared, and I enjoyed it very much.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Excellent food (I strongly recommend the chicken panang curry and mango sticky rice) and very good service !

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: แวะมาทานร้านนี้กับพี่ที่ทำงานครับเมนูนี้ถูกใจผมมากให้5ดาวเลยครับ#มาม่าต้มยำ#ร้านอาหารถนนนิมมาน

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: BOMB MANGO STICKY RICE (sorry I took the picture after ruining the aesthetic) - top mango sticky rice I’ve ever had in my life tbh!!!!!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Super delicious food! They have a whole page dadicated for vegetarians and vegans with authentic thai food. We had papaya salad and ask for spicy - it was heavenly! Panama curry with tofu- the sauce was super flavorful. Kao soi - huge and extraordinary mix of soft and fried noodles. And incredible sour tom yum with mushrooms. Highly recommend!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: I stopped there by chance while walking by.. delicious food, amazing staff, enjoyed my dinner :))

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Sweet and sour bream was great and I loved the morning glory dish. Great customer service.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Delicious and authentic Thai food. Came twice for dinner.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Great food and service, if you're Vegan they have great options. They even provide free cooking classes as well; how it works is that you choose your desired dish from the menu and that is how much it costs. Basically, you're cooking your own food at a restaurant but you're learning how to make your desired Thai dish. I chose Chicken Khao Soi, and it tasted amazing. If you're thinking about doing the free class call them to make a reservation first. Hope this helps!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: A wonderful find in Chiang Mai. Coming from Bangkok to Ayutthaya to Sukhothai to Chiang Rai, this was the most delicious and authentic Thai food we have tasted. And we love Thai food! We have eaten Thai all over the world. And in every Thai city we have been the four times we have visited this amazing country. We loved the food at this little restaurant so much we came back the next day for a free cooking class to learn the secret to their taste. All we had to pay for was the dish we made. It was my first time making and eating Thai Papaya salad. My wife made stir-fried basil chicken with a tweak of ginger that we had had the night before. What impressed us was how simple and quick they were to make. Yet there was nothing simple about how superbly delicious the two dishes were. If we may say so ourselves 👌🤗. It was a wonderful experience not just for our palette, but also for our holiday. 👍

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
Great food, big menu, great prices and very kind chef and owner. Halal-friendly!
Highly recommend to visit this restaurant. They also provide Thai cooking classes, which we booked, too.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Super yummy khao soi tofu and mango smoothie! Very pleasant atmosphere and staff!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: This is the best food I have eaten in Thailand! They provide halal and vegetarian options, which are hard to find. The Khao Sai Chicken and Panang Chicken were my favourites (although they were not on the menu, so just ask). If you book in advance and let them know which dish you want, they will teach you how to cook it too! The family running the restaurant are extremely sweet!  A must visit!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Best of the best i tried many different dishes all of them were delicious, and the prices are reasonable

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
We ordered for take out with "grab." We were inexperienced at using the grab app. Very patient with us they helped immensely by arranging the "grab" delivery for us and sent our food out to our air bnb. Truly the service was above and beyond the ordinary. Our food was excellent!
Very highly recommend this restaurant!!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Extensive vegan thai menu, and it is really good food, with a friendly welcome. Absolute gem of a find.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: เป็นร้านที่ดีมาก บริการก็ดี อาหารก็อร่อยถูกปาก

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text:
M had a wonderful meal hear . The food was delicious, fresh, and truly authentic. The staff was friendly, and the atmosphere was cozy and welcoming.

The best green curry i had so far in chiang mai. For muslim option

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Lovely staff. Great tasting Thai food. The cooking here is some of the best I have had in Thailand. Highly recommend! :)

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: พนักงานบริการดีมากครับ ว่างๆเดะไปกินอีก

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: The most amazing Thai green curry I’ve ever had! Friendliest staff who made sure to make my dish peanut free which can be difficult here. Thanks guys!!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Overall very good food!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Didn’t know a vegetarian Tom Yum Goong could be so darn fabulous!! Fried Sweet and Sour toufu is also a must-try! You can get the kitchen to prepare allium-free dishes.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Very good!   Crab fried rice is perfect!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: The flavor is a mix of sweet and sour, but it resembles Indian cuisine more than Thai. Overall, it wasn’t very enjoyable.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: I came repeatedly during my holiday in Chiang Mai, delicious food & very generous serving. Be careful not to order too much n waste food🤩 …

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Loved the food and service. First place we found with beautiful vegetarian food. The non veg was great too. We went back to get takeaway food. We will be eating here every day.

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Lovely food here and really nice family run place. Great service. Highly recommend the khaki soi! Also really good vegan and veggie options 🥰 …

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Everything we ate was delicious! Absolutely worth the money!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: I ordered pad thai and it was delicious. The ambience of the restaurants is nice too. Very recommended if you searching for halal and authentic thai food

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: From Thai people, this restaurant is the best choice for tourists to try some Thai food. There's also a Tom yum powder and the other Thai curry powder here!!! 💖💖💖 …

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Nice ambiance and good food. Pineapple smoothie was refreshing and good 💯 …

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Everything is good! Seafood & vegetables are very fresh. Mango sticky rice very good. We came back 2 days in a row for dinner

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Amazing ambience, food is spicy and great so flavorful and nice aroma. We really enjoyed the food and the service. All above staff are very friendly and amiable

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Take the morning glory and the mushroom with glass noodles salad! Very nice people!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Small and nice halal and vegetarian restaurant! The tom yum and khao soi is the best! Right at the city area of Nimman, the best place to come for halal food!

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Authentic and top class Thai Cuisine

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: I had delicious vegan food! Do recommend, you can also buy spices there for cooking 💪 …

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Cute and authentic family run restaurant ,Great food!  All The ingredients are organic from the owner’s farm. 10/10

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: ก็อร่อยดีนะ~~  mr. chat tv

Restaurant_Name: Thai Halal & Vegan มรกฎ More rar kot
Review_Text: Very nice Thai food with cosy atmosphere. Will recommend this restaurant if you are in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text:
I'd give this place 10 stars if I could. Top 3 foods I've eaten on my 5 week trip through Vietnam and Thailand. Every dish is excellent, especially the Khao Soi (curry noodle soup with choice of meat). Creamy, spicy, umami, texture of the egg noodles and crispy noodles, tenderness of the chicken - all of it is great.

50 baht for regular size, 60 for large. The 3rd dish on the menu is a bit more expensive if you go for the "special" size at 80 baht.

I've eaten here 3 times already and I'll eat here every day before I leave Chiang Mai. One of the owners is very nice and speaks english well enough to help you order.

Seriously, don't hesitate to eat here. Top marks for quality, flavor, value, speed of service, etc.

After you eat here you'll have a hard time justifying paying 4-10x for food that's not as good at all the foreigner-focused restaurants in the area.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: Don't get discouraged by its simple exterior and appearance. This is a hidden gem with the highest quality of food vs. price we have experienced so far, and we have been travelling around quite a bit. It is no exaggeration to say that this place hits the top marks in almost every spot you can think of. Genuine, tasty, local, and non-pretentious; street food does not get any better than this.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text:
I have my lunch on the 1st day of my Chiang Mai trip.  It's just 3 minutes walk from my hotel.  Actually I'd searched this place before travelling and found that most of the people have given positive comments.
I ordered the small size of Chicken Khao Soi, but it was served with a small plate of pickles and a cup of iced water.  Although I cannot eat too spicy food, I still found the Khao Soi super delicious (the chicken drumstick was so tender).
It only costs THB55 and it's a steal !

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: Thank you very much! We enjoyed the chicken khao soi and beef noodle very much. It was affordable and a great value. The kindness and friendliness of the owners made our visit special. We appreciate you!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: I had an amazing experience at the Noodle Shop! The Khao Soi, their signature dish, was absolutely delicious and had the perfect blend of flavors and spices. The noodles were cooked to perfection and the broth was so rich and satisfying. The heat level was perfect! The elderly lady who runs the shop was very sweet and welcoming, making the dining experience even more enjoyable. She continually checked in and made sure our experience was enjoyable.  The restaurant was located at an unassuming location but itself was clean and well-maintained. I highly recommend the Noodle Shop to anyone looking for a great bowl of Khao Soi. You won't be disappointed!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: Reasonable price and perfect service! You can’t image in such booth you are served iced water by the seller. The food is great but you have to endure the extreme hot weather in May of Chiangmai.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: It is a very local store that sells khao soi. I tried chicken khao soil for 60THB and it was good. There were 3 chicken drumsticks in the bowl. There is actually a table and chairs on the side of the store and it’s not bad at all.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text:
You really have to come here for the Beef Khao Soi - rich in taste, tender meat good portion for a very good price. I’m happy I found this spot and it won’t be the last time I eat here - that’s for sure!

Don’t be scared about the open air local style - it’s a clean spot and I had no problems whatsoever.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text:
I've been to most of the popular Khao Soi spots, but this one stood out to me. In my opinion, the soup is perfectly balanced and has just the right taste.

Most importantly, the stall is run by sisters who are absolutely the sweetest people. When I told her I didn't eat meat, she added greens to my soup whereas other places would only remove the meat.

You should definitely give it a try! ✨

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text:
Delicious inexpensive Khao Soi in Nimman area next to the busy street!

Kind fruit stall lady opposite her stall came to assist us in ordering as the sweet old shop owner didn't understand when we ordered in English. We had two bowls of Khao soi and one bowl Pork Noodles and we emptied all three bowls. The pork noodles was on the peppery side, really nice to have it on a chilly day.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: Had a couple bowls of Khao soi. Delicious.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: 100% must go.  Both the chicken and pork Khao Soi were phenomenal. We got to meet the two delightful sisters running the spot - so kind and welcoming! Can’t wait to go go back!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: It's not easy to find cheap and good food in this area, but this place has it. Run by a kind and cheerful middle aged lady, I ordered a bowl of beef noodle soup (THB 50). There is a special option which is pricier but has more ingredients. There are a few tables where you can dine in. The beef pieces were so tender. The broth was also very flavourful and I slurped up the whole bowl. Would definitely recommend.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: The food is insanely good and the woman who runs the stand is adorable and gives great customer service. If you want something with a little less spice, she'll give you a great recommendation. The khao soi is incredible and the chili crisp on the table is delicious but for the brave of heart. 10/10. Will return for more before we leave.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: The best chicken Khao Soi I’ve tasted. The shop ladies are lovely and the broth is divine. Will visit every time I’m in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text:
Thank you google reviews for introducing me to this shop. It was so good I have to write the review as well.

I had tried 3 different khao soi places (2 of them were on Michelin Guide) and this was the best one. The soup was fragrant (with Corriander) and not too oily(!!). We ordered the chicken, beef, and pork, and imo, the beef one won. It was so tender and flavourful.

Not to mention, it was really cheap (50 baht) and you get free cold water.
The old lady was very nice and she could speak simple english so ordering was no a problem.

I know the place does not seem too accommodating, but if you are in Nimman area and want to eat an authentic Khao Soi, I strongly recommend this one. AROI MAK ✨

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text:
We looked for this place after seeing the reviews and it lived up to expectations. Me and my partner had a pork Khao Soi and a chicken Khao Soi and they were both delicious. The people working were lovely and very friendly.
We'll definitely come back next time we're in Chiang Mai

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: Delicious, affordable khao soi from the nicest woman you could ever want to meet. She has a fresh fruit cart right across from the khao soi stand, as well, so be sure to grab some of that while you're there.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: Delicious Khao Soi served by the friendliest kindest woman. She brought us ice cold water, made me a veggie soup and recommended the beef for my boyfriend which he LOOOVED and her picked mustard greens tasted differently than all the others we've had - sweeter & spicier. She even sells fruit and was showing us her gorgeous pomelo, jackfruit, mango, durian, etc. The nicest lady. I wish her lived in Chiang Mai so that we could eat her fantastic soup all the time.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text:
So sad. We came around 11am but the shop was closed. :((

Update: Sorry, my bad. I didn't know it was a holiday. Hope to try your dish one day!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: Excellent place for a quick bowl of Khao Soi that would easily rival any of the other famous ones – if anything, it's my personal favorite. There's a super friendly vendor who also sells fruit on the side. If you're in Nimman, this is almost a must visit if you're a foodie.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: ​Pa Kiang Noodles Shop is a hidden gem in Chiang Mai’s Nimman area, cherished by locals and visitors alike for its authentic Thai noodle dishes. With a stellar Google rating of 4.9, it's praised for its flavorful broths and tender meats, offering a genuine taste of Northern Thai cuisine. The shop, run by a friendly family, provides a warm and welcoming atmosphere, enhancing the dining experience. Operating from 10:30 AM to 5:30 PM and closed on Sundays, it's an ideal spot for a satisfying lunch or early dinner. If you're exploring Chiang Mai and seeking a local culinary delight, Pa Kiang Noodles Shop is a must-visit.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: This place is amazing and quickly became my favorite spot for cheap and tasty food in Nimman! Strongly recommend but make sure you have a bowl and spoon if you get take out! Amazing people and mainly locals eating here (which is how you know its both great tasting and cheap)

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: The best meal I’ve ever have in Chiang Mai🥹🙏🏼💕 The Khao Soi was so perfect!!! My friend also told me that the noodles was so delicious too! Only 50 bahts for a normal size noodles / Khao Soi.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text:
Best price
Tasty noodle
Very good healing energy
Khao Soi in Chiangmai - a must-try dish

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: The best Khao Soi in town. I found this place last year and love it. The broth is superb and I love the beef. Better than the recommended Michelin places in town.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: A place with a little natures, although beside Nimman main road but never disrupt the quietness & the peacefulness here. The khao soi is amazingly cooked, definitely will come back again. Friendly owner too 🙏🏼👍🏼😀

Review_Text: Came across this shop while walking and it did not disappoint! I ordered Khao Soi Chicken and it was really good- the broth is not too thick and flavorful! Highly recommended!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text:
I’ve eaten a lot of Khao soi around Chiang Mai, Chiang Rai, and Pai, and this humble little noodle shop stands toe to toe with the best of the best.

I believe it’s run by two adorable sisters who take great care of their customers. Everything was absolutely perfect, and priced well as far as this level of quality goes.

We will be back here again and again.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text: Simple yet made with love, satisfying. We went first thing in the morning and the lady boss was so nice!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านก๋วยเตี๋ยวป้าเกี๋ยง
Review_Text:

The lady boss, it's really friendly.

Review_Text: I can’t stop eating here. The khao soi is just spot on, perfect amount of spice, and only 50 - 60 baht. It’s a super friendly spot, just off the main road and obviously has a lot of local regulars.

Review_Text:
Amazing khao soi I cleared the entire bowl along with the soup.

The shop owner was very sweet and welcoming. :) She didn't seem to understand English but there is an English menu and another kind lady from the fruit store nearby came over to help us with the ordering.

The store is in a small unassuming corner but pretty easy to find as it's just right along the main street. Do drop by for a meal if you're looking for some good khao soi :)

Review_Text: Very delicious Khao Soi Chicken! For only about 60 Baht it was a perfect quick dinner on my way home. If you're in the area wanting to try Khao Soi, I would highly recommend this place.

ถ้ามามื้อกลางวันจนถึงช่วงบ่ายครึ่งเตรียมใจกับคิวหน่อยค่ะ แต่ถ้าหลังบ่ายสองดูคนเริ่มน้อยแล้ว

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: ไก่ย่างอร่อยมาก หนังกรอบ เนื้อนุ่ม มาร้อนๆ น้ำจิ้มเด็ด อาหารอย่างอื่นรสชาติกลางๆ ส้มตำจืดไปหน่อย หวานนำ เหมาะกับนักท่องเที่ยว บริการดี ราคากลางๆไม่แพงไม่ถูก

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
A very popular roast chicken restaurant in Chiang Mai.

However, service wise needs some work with consistency.

Unfortunately, my experience was mixed with ups and down.

Despite good flavour from the grilled chicken, the main star was served to me semi-hot. So I wasn’t into it that much since the chicken is not sizzling hot as if it has been laid to rest for quite awhile.

Som Tam was awesome with great combination of salted crab.

The crowd management was bad. 3 crowd who was behind me just forced themselves inside and the staff happily just accepted them before me.

That was a turn off. I was about to leave because of that treatment but thankfully a lady staff saw the incident and quickly apologised and prioritised me.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: อาหารอร่อย ไก่ย่างหนังกรอบ น้ำจิ้มดีมาก อาหารออกค่อนข้างไว รอไม่นาน พนักงานบริการดี  มีที่จอดรถข้างๆร้าน

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Tucked away from the hustle and bustle of Nimman is this unassuming roast chicken place with delicious food at an affordable price. We got slow roasted chicken, mushroom soup, fried papaya salad and corn som tham. The chicken and papaya salad are must try.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: This is a mecca for grilled chicken. If you were to casually pass by, it would look like any ordinary Thai restaurant. I initially went in with no expectations, but when the perfectly cooked chicken arrived, I couldn't contain my surprise. I knew this was a mecca for grilled chicken. Aside from the grilled chicken, the other menu items weren't particularly special. I recommend the cucumber salad. The freshness of the cucumber and the nutty flavor of the peanuts combine perfectly with the steamed rice and chicken.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
The grill chicken is good, can order glutinous rice and go with it. There’s also normal rice.
Overall the restaurant get crowded when it is near to the lunch hours. We went earlier so there’s no much tourists yet.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: This place really is the best! I’ve had delivery before, but nothing beats eating here in person. The chicken is incredible, and all the salads and soups are so good. And the fried papaya? To die for.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: very very bad services สั่งแบบกลับบ้าน นั่งรอนานมาก ยุงกัดจะเป็นไข้เลือดออก พอจะไปแคนเซิลอาหาร บอกเสร็จแล้ววางไว้ที่เก้าอี้ แล้วที่นั่งรอหัวโด่ตั้งนานคือไม่เห็นจริงๆหรือว่าพนักงานตาบอดคะ ไม่ได้รับคำขอโทษใดๆจากพนักงาน รสชาติอาหารก็ไม่ได้ดีเลย ไก่ย่างหนังกรอบ กรอบวันไหนคะ เอาเถอะค่ะ เสียเงินให้แค่ครั้งเดียว รสชาติแย่ยังไม่น่าเสียความรู้สึกเท่าบริการแย่ๆเลยค่ะ ใครจะไปกิน คิดดีๆนะคะ อ่านรีวิวหน่อยค่ะ ทางนี้เองก็พลาดมากกกกกกกกกก

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
their roast chicken is seriously delicious, tender, juicy, and packed with flavor. You can tell it’s grilled to perfection.

The atmosphere is simple but comfortable, and the staff are friendly and quick. I also tried their papaya salad and sticky rice — both were super tasty and went perfectly with the chicken.

Prices are reasonable, and the food comes out fast. Great spot for a casual and satisfying local meal. I’d definitely come back
9/10

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: ไก่ย่างและส้มตำอร่อยมาก ราคาสำหรับนักท่องเที่ยว แต่ก็รู้สึกว่าคุ้มค่ากับบรรยากาศใจกลางเมือง และคุณภาพที่ได้รับ ไม่มีอะไรให้ติเลยค่ะ

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: It was kinda overvibed , the chicken unfortunately did not live up to my expectation and many Koreans were there when I pay a visit on 12/08/25 , I had better roasted chicken like polo fried chicken from bkk . The corn salad was normal too if you are a fanatic of it like me . There's another popular store within nimman which I yet to try and hopefully I would have the time to before I leave chiangmai . Kinda hard to spot the store too but look out for the big mango tree covering the store .

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: I was actually looking forward to this grilled chicken as grilled chicken is famous in northern Thai. However, it’s was below expectation, we ordered the recommend dishes those grilled chicken & pork. Not something that surprise us, the grilled chicken is dry and not really flavorful. Somtam is the worst, not making with real lime juice. Kind of disappointed. Staff isn’t welcoming too, no longer land of smile.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Corn salad and chicken larb were really nice but the grilled chicken was just insane. Definitely one of my top food spots in Chiang Mai!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
A small and casual eatery that is popular with tourists and locals.

The food was delish and portions are smaller, but you can always reorder more.  We especially liked the grilled pork and grilled chicken, as well as the deep fried papaya slivers that we ordered the dishes another time.

The tom yum soup was also fresh and good and sour but with mushrooms.

Service was quick and friendly.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
We arrived just after 5:30 PM and got seated right away — no wait 🙌
A friend I came with raved about the papaya tempura, and honestly? They were right. Next-level.
fried things are always good, but this was gourmet-tier good.
Lighter than fries, crispier, and super addictive. I’m already craving it again.

The corn som tam was also amazing — sweet, tangy, fresh, and full of flavor. One of the best versions I’ve had in Thailand 🌽💛

this place is known for grilled chicken, but for me…
the papaya tempura and corn som tam totally stole the show.
The meat dishes were okay, but nothing as memorable as those two plates.

If you’re coming, trust me — don’t skip the papaya tempura.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
I don't understand why this place has such high ratings. The chicken is bland with no seasoning or sauces served with it. The som tam was fine but fairly standard stuff.

I think it might be famous in Chinese social media or something but it's really nothing special. Probably the most boring meal I've had in cnx so far.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
The fired chicken is very good, crispy skin and tender meat.
The Tom Yum soup was just as nice with a strong lemongrass note.
The fried papaya salad is a must try.
Definitely worth a visit although expect some waiting time.
Portions are on the smaller side but the prices are very reasonable.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
Cherng Doi Roast Chicken
This spot is all about the chicken. Crispy skin, juicy meat, smoky from the charcoal. The papaya salad? Fresh, tangy, got that kick. Sticky rice comes hot and chewy, perfect match. Prices are fair, locals mix with tourists, always busy but never feels messy. Service is quick, no fuss. If you’re in Chiang Mai and craving proper Isaan-style roast chicken, this is the move. Simple, honest, delicious.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Had the roast chicken which was tender juicy and crispy. Mushroom Tom Yam soup was light & refreshing. Tempura papaya salad was unique and went well with the accompanying sauce. All 5 ⭐️ dishes.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
English is below
อาหารอีสานในภาคเหนือที่มีต่างชาติมาทานกันเยอะมาก รสชาติก็จะออกเบาๆ ไม่เผ็ดมาก รสไม่จัด ราคาก็กลางๆจานนึงก็เกือบร้อย นั่งในที่ไม่มีแอร์  มีที่จอดรถที่เตรียมให้

This is an Isaan (northeastern Thai) restaurant in Northern Thailand that's very popular with foreigners. The food tends to be mild, not very spicy, and not too strong in flavor. The prices are mid-range, with dishes costing almost a hundred baht. You'll be sitting in a non-air-conditioned space, but there is dedicated parking available.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: อาหารรสชาติดีทุกเมนู ไก่หนังกรอบอร่อย ย่างดี ส้มตำทอดน้ำส้มตำปรุงมาดี กลมกล่อม เนื้อย่างนุ่มไม่เหนียว ราคาแต่ละจานก็ไม่แพง ร้านมีที่จอดรถอยู่ด้านข้างของร้าน

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: ​A great value spot! The food was good, and the boneless chicken was outstanding. The only drawback is the limited seating, which means you might have to wait during peak times.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: อร่อยทุกอย่าง ที่หนึ่งในใจไก่ย่างหนังกรอบ ❤️❤️❤️ เลิฟร้านนี้สุดๆ

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Delicious roast chicken with crispy skin and juicy meat! Our family loved the flavorful Thai dishes and cozy atmosphere. Friendly staff and reasonable prices make it a great spot for a family meal.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: เคยมาทานนานแล้วอร่อยมากๆ เลยตั้งใจพาลูกมากินไก่หนังกรอบ สั่งไก่มาสองจานไม่มีความกรอบเลย และหมูโหระพาหมูเหม็นมากกกกกย้ำว่าพยายามกินแบบไม่อคติแล้ว สุดท้ายเหลือเต็ม เสียดายทั้งเงินทั้งความรู้สึก ไม่คิดว่าจะเปลี่ยนไปขนาดนี้

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
ในวันที่น้ำท่วมเชียงใหม่ พ่อค้าถึงกับตัดพ้อตัวเองว่า ร้านส้มตำอะไรก็ไม่รู้ ไม่มีส้มตำขาย เพราะมะละกอส่งไม่ได้ น้ำท่วมค่ะ ก็ให้กำลังใจกันไป
สั่งไก่ย่าง เค้าสมราคาจริงค่ะ 100 บาท หนังกรอบมาก มันไม่ใช่ไก่เนื้อแบบนุ่มนิ่ม น่าจะเป็นไก่ไทย เนื้อแน่น รีบกินตอนร้อน ๆ จะฟินมาก
ยำหมูย่าง รสจัดจ้านมาก อร่อยค่ะ
ตำแตงปูปลาร้า เพราะไม่มีมะละกอ เลยสั่งตำแตงมาแทน คือสำหรับเราที่ไม่คุ้นรสส้มตำคนเหนือ เราว่ามันจืด ๆ อ่ะค่ะ แต่พอเอาคอมบิเนชั่นของทั้งสามจานมารวมกัน มันอร่อยมาก รสชาติเรียงกันดีมาก กินไก่ย่าง กินยำ ตามด้วยตำแตง คือมันพอดีแบบเริ่ดเว่อร์ค่ะ ถ้าสั่งไม่ครบ 3 จานนี้ คิดว่ารสมันจะโดด ๆ ไปไม่สุดค่ะ
ในร้านแทบไม่มีคนไทยเลย แต่อร่อยค่ะ

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: มากินที่นี่ไม่บ่อย อาหารอร่อยพอได้รสมะนาวสำเร็จรูปเปรี้ยว ห้องน้ำควรปรับ แคบ วางที่แขวนทิชชูผิดด้านปิดยาก ชนตลอดจะหักคะแนนนะ

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: The atmosphere is better at outdoor tables than indoor tables. Write it down on the order form and give it to the staff. The chicken is a familiar flavor, but it's delicious. The fried papaya is also delicious.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Nice n cozy thai restaurant serving yummy local dishes. It's either cash or local QR only. Crispy chicken and Singha - perfect combination.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
ส่วนตัวคิดว่าเฉยเฉย!

ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย ของอร่อยของเขาคือไก่ย่าง
เนื้อชุ่ม  หนังกรอบบาง จัดว่าอร่อยเลย

ส่วนส้มตำ  ตำมะม่วง ให้ปริมาณน้อย
รสชาติคือไม่แซ่บเลย  ต้องขอมะนาวเพิ่ม

ส่วนต้มแซ่บคือไม่ร้อน  รสชาติไม่ออกทางใดทางหนึ่งเลย ไม่ได้ว้าวเลย

ร้านมีโซน Ourdoor และห้องแอร์
ห้องแอร์เป็นขนาดเล็กโต๊ะแน่นแน่นติดกัน  เสียงจะอึ้งอึ้งมาก แอร์ก็ไม่ได้เย็นมาก ลูกค้าส่วนใหญ่เป็นเกาหลี จีนและต่างชาติ
ถ้าอยากกินส้มตำแซ่บแซ่บ  ร้านนี้ไม่ได้เลยค่ะ
แต่ถ้าอยากกินไก่ย่างหนังกรอบก็เชิญค่ะ

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: There are outdoor and indoor seating in the restaurant. And the restaurant is clean, which is a plus. Their menu shows all the ingredients, which is very friendly for picky eaters. The roasted chicken was well-seasoned, and the texture was good!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: The roast chicken here was absolutely delicious when I visited some time back. To top it off, the price is cheap and the staff are very friendly as well. Will definitely recommend this place to anyone visiting Chiangmai!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: This is one of those local restaurants that gained a reputation for doing a few classic dishes very well for years and with great value. Highly recommend the grilled chicken and pork shoulder salad.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
Roast chicken was superb! Initially ordered one plate but ended up ordering one more 🥹 skin is crispy and fragrant, meat is juicy and tender.

Papaya salad was not bad, perhaps I’m a more fan of mango salad.

Grilled pork steak is another dish worth trying! Juice and tender meat!

Crispy pork with basil and garlic was bad. The meat is so hard. Definitely will not recommend.

Sticky rice is bad, so hard! Feels overnight rice instead.

Coconut ice cream is just normal. Nothing fancy.

Ordered two soups as well - Tom yum and pork bone. I recommend the latter as it wasn’t too spicy and I can really taste the sweetness of meat in the soup!

Overall will recommend this place! 😋

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: A lowkey spot tucked away in a small alley. The food is delicious, especially the grilled chicken. A plus is the air-conditioned room, even though the place isn’t very big. Reasonable prices—definitely worth a try!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
ไม่อร่อยเลย สำหรับ 4 จานที่ recommend และสั่งกิน
ผมพราดมากิน เพราะ rating  ดี
แต่พอมาถึง ทั้งร้าน ลูกค้าไม่เป็นคนไทยเลย ก็เสียวแล้ว  พอได้กินก็ เซ็ง!
ครับ

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: กินมาเป็น10 ปีแล้วค่ะ อร่อยประทับใจทุกครั้ง ที่มาเชียงใหม่ ขอบคุณมากคะ ทางร้านมีที่จอดรถแล้ว!! 🥰

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Very very "meh" of a place. So I love stopping by the random roadside bamboo shacks with a grill out front, most of the time they're serving classic Issan street eats which are grilled pork necks/filets, chicken thighs and all the assortments of papaya salads. I've stopped by hundreds of these places and really got a taste for what's good. While in Chiang Mai I had a craving for such food and found this location....boy what a disappointment! Food is a joke, not just the portion sizes as other reviewers point out, but the flavor of the som tom was lazy. Just some papaya and a sprinkle of fish sauce, possibly the worst I've ever tried. The ground pork salad was undercooked and equally as lazy. No ground rice or any flavorful ingredients, rendering it among the 3 worst I've ever had easily. The only thing halfway decent was the pork filet, and it should have been. Waited almost an hour for it to come out. Only upon leaving and reading the other reviews did I notice this place is famous for some reason...it definitely shouldn't be. Food is on the low end of average bordering terrible. Find elsewhere is my advice, as I am going to do.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
Food is tasty, and value for money! Many seats, all outdoor seating. There are many mosquitoes though.

Roasted chicken is fragrant and juicy. Fried pineapple salad is really good too. Tom yum soup goes really well with the rice noodles cake.

Dessert is tasty too, recommended to try both their coconut ice cream and the toddy plam in syrup! Will definitely visit again!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
SO GOOD!!!
the roasted chickin has almost no bones in it 105B, a huge portion for one person. And papaya salad 50B so yummy!! And sticky rice it looks small but actually fulfilling 15B. Total bill comes with 170B

I love the chicken so tender and juicy and it has this a little spicy sauce which is beautiful

Please come and enjoy.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: อาหารอร่อยไก่ย่าง ไก่ทอด อร่อยมากค่ะ ส้มตำ ตามสั่งจริง ชอบแบบไหนได้แบบนั้น คอหมูได้คอหมู ข้าวเหนียวนิ่มมาก โดยรวม ชอบมาก ถ้า ขึ้นมาครั้งหน้าก็ที่นี่แหละ ต้องฝากท้อง ราคา รับได้

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
The grilled chicken and papaya salad were delicious! But It was really spicy for me as i couldnt eat spicy, even i asked for the minimum spicy. Guess the Thai level of spiciness is just totally different. But the chicken was really juicy and well seasoned.
Totally recommend.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Gets crowded after about 7pm on a weekday. Decent amount of seating so the turnover is quite fast. Pricing is very reasonable for the portion of food they give. An order of the chicken can easily be shared amongst 2 people if you order other items. Well worth a trip down to try this.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
Good place to have a quick meal. We ordered their signature roasted chicken, as well as pork shoulder and papaya salad.

There are several different options of papaya salads. We just took a classic one and it was good. Recommend coming earlier cause the place is small and we saw a big line when we were leaving. (Around 5.30pm)

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Not sure why there’s a major Korean invasion in this restaurant. The food is quite good, but the service is lacking. The place itself is nice. There are huge queues because extreme slow table cleaning and payment process is for sure annoying.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
It's a solid option if you're looking for tasty Esan cuisine (Thai northeast), especially grilled chicken, while in Chiang Mai.

The highlight is definitely the grilled chicken—it's boneless, easy to eat, and absolutely delicious. The other dishes are also great, with just the right level of spice.

Recommended!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
Easily the worst Isaan food I've ever had. Small portions, high prices, and the taste is way off.

The taste of the gai yang and nam tok aren't even close.

I guess they are catering to the tastes of Chinese and Korean tourists, but of you like Isaan food, this definitely isn't the place.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
The roast chicken was amazing! The charcoal grill taste was strong and fragrant, the meat was tender and juicy. Had to order an additional portion at the end!

The fried papaya salad was really interesting too. The batter was light and went so well with the sauce, the taste was exactly what you would expect from a papaya salad, with a twist of the light crunch.

It was not crowded when I was there at about 3pm.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
ดีงาม ตามที่ควรจะเป็น
รสชาติดี ไก่ย่าง น้ำจิ้มมะขามอร่อย
ส้มตำข้าวโพดดี คอหมูโหระพาแอบไม่ค่อยโดน

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
ไก่ย่างหนังกรอบจริงๆ อร่อย ข้าวเหนียวเป็นเม็ดฟูอร่อย คอหมูโหระพากรอบเหนียวแห้งไปหน่อย
ต้มมะขามรสชาติถึงอร่อย
พวกส้มตำไม่เผ็ดทำรสกลางๆ ให้คนต่างชาติ

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: the food was okay, but overall dry and not well balanced flavor for my taste. overpowering sourness. The rice was good. the outside kitchen looked seemed old and the kitchen worker didn’t clean his hands well after using the toilet 😓 But it’s good for the price

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
The food is quite good overall, though the presentation could use some improvement. That said, as long as it tastes great, that’s what matters most! The prices are reasonable, but the portion sizes reflect that as well.

The place is clean, and the service is decent.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Tucked away on a side street in the Nimman area, this restaurant specializes in roast chicken. You look at the menu and mark what you want off a checklist menu. All the seating is outside but shaded from the sun, there is one fan in the corner so try to sit by that corner on hot days. There’s nothing fancy about this restaurant but I love places like this. 😊 The service is fast, the prices are affordable, and the food is delicious! I left with a happy and full belly. 😋

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
Food was good. Most came out fast despite the staff being a bit slow. It's cash only or local QR scan only.

The portions are on the smaller side so don't be afraid to try a few things. The grilled chicken and pork steak with dip were the best two by far.

Tissues are on the walls besides the tables.

They close at 8:30pm and last order at 8pm.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: If you are finding a place that have yummy eastern Thai food, i recommend this restaurant

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: The most renowned grilled chicken in Chiang Mai. Gai Yang Choeng Doi is Michelin guide awarded restaurant, which they specialized in grilled chicken and Thai comfort food. The grilled chicken is amazingly good, it perfectly cooked with the golden skin outside that make it crispy. The chicken is tender and juicy, and you can feel the herb and spice that were used to marinated the chicken, not to oily and eat it with their chili dipping sauce. You also can find the Thai Esarn dish like Pork Steak or Somtum the Thai papaya salad, really nice and enjoyable with the chicken. Grilled Pork Collar is a bit blend and average. This place the food is really not too spicy, overall taste is fine but the grilled chicken is the real dominant one. If you looking food the tasty grilled chicken this place is recommended. Price is reasonable, not too cheap or expensive, it still worth place to visit.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: The roast chicken was delicious. The fried papaya salad was a welcomed change to the normal Thai papaya salad. The pork soft bone soup was sour and not so spicy. Customer service could be improved though. The wait staffs are a bit young so perhaps inexperienced.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: I ordered charcoal grilled chicken and pork with bamboo and papaya salad and a bottle of beer and it came out to 370 baht. The taste of the charcoal grilled chicken is just right, but it can't be said to be the best. Although it is famous, it is not a place worth recommending.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: My friend and I found this little gem on here and wanted to add our recommendations! It’s best to go not too late because they do run out of things (they actually didn’t have any more rice when we went but that was our fault)! But since we did go late we didn’t have to wait to get a seat. The ordering is all done by writing on paper menus like how much you want of each dish, and they can come give you an English version as the one on the tables is Thai! Also the drink and food menus were separate - just a note! They have a picture menu too with all the names in English and a photo of what it will look like, which was super helpful. We went quite late (around like 9pm) so we missed out on the signature / recommended roast pork but still got lots of tasty dishes - roast chicken, a deep fried papaya salad, and pork with crispy basil! The Thai teas were tasty as well! Definitely worth going!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: I was recommended by a local tour guide to check out this place. It's good. Tasty dishes I tried included the must-try chicken (which came Luke warm), fried pork (had much better), and a tempura type dish which served as a beer accompaniment for me. This is a no-frills food joint so it's not fancy at all. Could be a waiting period depending on the time as locals do eat here too. Worth the visit especially if you're in the neighborhood.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
I don’t give out five star ratings often. Doesn’t make sense to.

Cherng Doi Roast Chicken however, is worth the five stars in my opinion. Fresh, fast, reasonably priced. Mild or spicy Thai food that is easy to order and a delight to eat. Delicious sauces and preparation.

Outdoor seating area without sun, flies or mosquitoes…

I’ll be back!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
Really good. Came back for a second time. Especially loved the dishes in the pictures.
The crispy chicken, the cucumber salad and the fried Som Tam. Great value for money.
But watch the opening hours: Last oder at 8PM.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
ราคาไม่แพง แต่อาหารธรรมดามากๆ ไม่อร่อย ลูกค้าส่วนใหญ่น่าจะเป็นต่างชาติ ส่วนตัวคงไม่ไปทานอีกค่ะ สั่งตับหวาน ตำแตงปลาร้า ข้าวเหนียว ตับหวานสั่งแบบไม่สุก แต่ทำมาสุกจนแข็ง แค่อาหารง่ายๆ ยังไม่อร่อย
ทางร้านควรปรับปรุงรสชาติอาหารให้ดีกว่านี้ พนักงานควรปรับปรุงเช่นกัน

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: ไก่หนังกรอบดีค่ะ ลาบหมูอร่อยค่ะ แต่ปริมาณค่อนข้างน้อย ข้าวเหนียวไม่ค่อยร้อน ที่จอดรถค่อนข้างน้อยค่ะ

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: ร้านแนวอีสาน เก่าแก่ เมนูแนะนำไก่ทอดหนังกรอบ อาหารเมนูอื่นๆรสไม่จัดมาก ไม่มีห้องแอร์ มีลานจอดรถสะดวก

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Great chicken, other dishes soso. The chicken, their signature dish, was very delicious, had a sweet flavor, juicy meat, slightly crispy skin and was almost boneless. I considered ordering a second serving. But the other dishes were very average in my opinion. The Som Tam seemed optimized for tourists. Sweet and limy, but no chili, no fish sauce and no dried shrimp. Deep fried Som Tam is an interesting concept, but at the end you are only eating fried dough. Pork with fried basil was alright, but very fat. Sticky rice was like anywhere else. The drinks were way too sweet, undrinkable, even though we ordered without sugar. Service was not very attentive and they brought us the wrong drinks. Chicken is 5 stars, the rest 3 stars, so in total 4 stars.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Best charcoal-grilled chicken restaurant in Chiang Mai!!! I have tried this restaurant more than 10times over the past 3 years and I can tell you this place offers one of the best grilled chicken ever!!!! The combination of sticky rice and their grilled chicken is super good!!!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
เข้าร้านแล้วก็เดินไปสั่งเอง ไม่มีใครมาถาม .. งงนิดหน่อย .. รายการอาหารสั่งกลับบ้านทั้งหมด 5 รายการ .. เก็บเงินตั้งแต่ตอนออร์เดอร์เลย ไม่มีใบเสร็จ #ลูกค้าไม่หนีหรอกทำไมร้านรีบเคลียร์ .. ระหว่างรอรับอาหาร ร้านบอกนั่งรอตรงไหนก็ได้ 😱

รอไม่นาน ได้รับอาหารแล้ว กำลังเดินกลับไปที่รถตรงลานจอดด้านข้างร้าน แก๊งเด็กอายุไม่เกิน 10 ปี กำลังเล่นกัน โดยการกอบหินโรยพื้นลานจอดมาปาใส่กัน ... #เจอหินโดนหัวโดนตัวไปหนึ่งกอบมือถ้วน แล้วก็มีเสียงเอ็ดตะโรดังมาจากร้านสมูธตี้ข้างๆ 🙄 ใส่หูฟังเลยไม่ได้ยินชัดว่าพูดอะไร แต่ตอนนั้นก็เริ่มมองตาขวางละ #แล้วรถที่จอดในลานล่ะ ...

กลับมาถึงบ้าน ใช้เวลาประมาณ 20 นาที เริ่มรับประทานอาหารกัน หน้าตาอาหารน่ารัก ตะมุตะมิ รสชาติดี ถูกปาก ไก่ย่างกรอบจริงอร่อยจริง ยำ&ลาบ จี๊ดจริง ส้มตำคือดี .. แต่ปริมาณจะไม่มากนัก เอาเป็นว่าให้รับประทานหลากหลายดีกว่า อิ่มแบบพอดีๆ .. น่าจะมาร้านนี้อีก เพราะรสชาติอาหารที่ถูกปากจริงๆ .. ครั้งหน้าคงไม่น่าเจอแก๊งแสบแล้วมั้ง .. ภาพถ่ายไม่ครบตามรายการที่ซื้อมานะ

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Possibly my favorite roast chicken spots in Chiang Mai and I tried like 4 of them. It was tender and juicy. Can’t complain

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Reallt crowded again, as this is a Michelin. I had to wait really long, the roast chicken was not bad, but tbh it's not what I should queue for 2 nights to get it. Friendly service and quite good atmoaphere by the way.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
รสชาติส้มตำอร่อย หมูทอดและต้มยำรสชาติดี ข้อเสียที่จอดรถไม่มี
มาทานอีกครั้ง 4/12/2022
ทางร้านมีที่จอดรถแล้ว สะดวกสบาย
ร้านเปิด11.00-20.00 น. รสชาติยังอร่อยเหมือนเดิม แตรสชาติส้มตำเปลี่ยนนิดหน่อย ราคาปรับขึ้น ตามเงินเฟ้อ ไม่มีกระดาษทิชชูบริการที่โต๊ะ มีบริการติดอยู่ตามเสาของร้าน

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Have eaten here several times. Great food at an affordable price not overly big portions but all are delicious. Often a queue it is that popular. Nice setting too.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
They live up to what they are good for which is their roasted chicken and their papaya salad!

We order an extra plate even though we finished our rice!

The papaya salad is so refreshing!

The only bad thing is that there is no proper parking space.

Had to park at the hotel and pay THB100 for an hour.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: This place is very popular, however I'm not sure its deserving this popularity. The lime is a juice and not actual fresh lime, this ruins their som tam and the dipping sauce that goes with the chicken and all the other dishes. I live in Thailand but a foreigner and even I can tell the difference! It's a shame because they are cutting costs which is comprimising the falvour, it doesn't even cost a lot to buy a few fresh limes each day!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: This place is located across from the All Black coffee shop, which I've been frequenting. I became curious about it due to the constant stream of tourists leaving reviews. Intrigued, I decided to give it a try to assess its flavors. However, it appears that this restaurant's appeal lies primarily with tourists; its offerings like somtum and roast chicken fail to impress those like me who have resided in Thailand for 8 years. The corn salad, for instance, turned out excessively salty. Having lived in Thailand for an extended period, I've had the pleasure of tasting far superior dishes. While this spot may cater well to tourists, it falls short of meeting the preferences of locals like myself.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
I recently had a delightful dining experience that left me pleasantly surprised. The variety of grilled meat options, including chicken and pork, were absolutely delicious and surpassed all expectations. Each bite was bursting with flavors, and the tenderness of both the chicken and pork was perfect, making it a truly enjoyable feast.
The skilled preparation of the grilled dishes made the entire meal a memorable and satisfying one. The combination of succulent chicken and flavorful pork provided a delightful contrast that pleased my taste buds.
However, I must admit that I had a bit of a mixed feeling about the Thai coffee. It tasted more like roasted tea, which was a bit unexpected for me. Despite this, it was just a minor flaw that didn't overshadow the overall wonderful dining experience.
I highly recommend this place to anyone visiting Chiang Mai. The mouthwatering grilled meat, be it chicken or pork, alone is worth the visit. So, don't miss the chance to dine at this restaurant during your time in Chiang Mai. It's a must-visit for any food lover!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Just chicken and corn somtam. Not special, but quite crowded. Worth visiting once, though there are better options.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: เด็ดสุดของร้าน ไก่ย่างหนังกรอบ อร่อยทุกเมนู อาหารประเภทไทยอีสาน ที่ร้านมีที่จอดรถสะดวก ราคาไม่แพง

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Just saw that recent review and it’s way off. This is a great little restaurant and the food is excellent. I’ve spent loads of time in Thailand and this place stands out. I usually get the grilled chicken, som tam and laab. All great and not dry at all! Try it for yourself.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: อาหารรสชาติเปรี้ยวนำ ไม่ว่าจะเป็นส้มตำ ต้มยำกระดูกหมูก็เปรี้ยวจนซดนำ้ไม่ได้ นำ้จิ้มไก่ก็เปรี้ยวมาก ราคาแพงด้วย สำหรับคนไทยก็ถือว่ารสชาติไม่ค่อยผ่านจ้า❌

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: ไก่ย่างอร่อยมาก หนังกรอบ เนื้อนุ่ม น้ำจิ้มแจ่วเข้มข้น กับข้าวอร่อยหลายอย่าง ตำซั่วปลาร้าเด็ดสุดๆ ตับหวานสะดุ้งก็อร่อย

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Ate here two consecutive days! The roast chicken was spectacular - very succulent and crispy skin. The pork rib soup was amazing!! The pork just fell off the bone, and the soup was perfectly sour, spicy and salty. …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: เปิดมานานละ ไก่ย่างหนังกรอบ อันเนี่ยเครเลย👍🏻👍🏻 เมนูอื่นรสชาติจะไม่ได้จัดจ้านแบบอีสานแท้ เป็นรสชาติกลาง ๆ ที่ทุกคนกินได้ ☺️☺️ …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Only good for environment, horrible service cause all waiter serves food like moodless zombie. Never ask if need help and no interaction, only the boss smile when paying money (suspect treatment towards staff ain’t good?). Portion way too …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: เพิ่งได้มีโอกาส ได้ไปกินข้าวเหนียว ส้มตำ ไก่ย่างหนังกรอบ ลาบไก่ ต้องขอบอกว่าอร่อยค่ะ ทุกเมนูที่สั่งต้องเพิ่มเมนูล่ะ 2จานค่ะ 555

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Somtum restaurant located at the center of Nimman road, very easy to find. The grill roasted chicken is very very tasty and not oily but other dishes are just so so. The taste is for foreigner and tourist and suitable for Thai people.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Roasted chicken skin was tasty and indeed crispy . While the grilled/roast pork was tender, juicy and delicious too. Loved the coconut ice cream for dessert.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: ตำไทยก็อร่อยดี คอหมูย่างกับไก่รสชาติธรรมดา ไก่เหมือนไม่สดเลยไม่อร่อย พอกินได้ น่าจะเหมาะกับคนต่างชาติ รสชาติคนไทยไม่น่าชอบ

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: A lovely little oasis of green in the fancy Nimman area. The roast chicken was good but not as spectacular as I had been led to believe; it was just roast chicken with a little sauce. However, the Som Tam Thai and the Larb Moo were outstanding, and more than made up for it!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
ร้านประจำทุกครั้งที่มาเชียงใหม่ต้องมา
ไก่ย่าง the best หมูทอดโหระพา ก็ดีย์ ส้มตำคือเป็นรสชาติที่ชอบเลย พาใครมาทานก็ชอบ

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Found this place in the hip Nimman area. Spoilt for choice as i wanted to try so many on their menu. Went with their signature roasted chicken with sticky rice, pork bone soup and crispy papaya salad. Every dish was amazing! The chicken is …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
Nice food with a simple furnishings place.

Grill chicken tasted great, and papaya salad is really spicy. …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Michelin recommended restaurant just a few mins walking from One Nimman. The roast chicken is great with the sauce (a little spicy so watch it if you can't bear the spicy), I love the fried som tam (part of it might be I am crispy food lover). Reasonable price. I came around 6:00pm and no need to wait in line.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: ตัวไก่ย่างหนังกรอบกับน้ำจิ่มสูตรทางร้านอร่อยครับ ส่วนส้มตำไม่ได้เด่นมากนัก

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
Small restaurant that I discovered the day of my departure unfortunately...

Good price and delicious traditional Thai food. The portions of each dish are small like tapas (between 50-120 bahts) so you can try many!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: The roast chicken is nice and crispy but flavor-wise I feel that it's quite mild. Pork with basil is too dry and the amount of pork is too little. There is no air conditioner inside the restaurant so it can be really warm in a hot day. Price is quite reasonable.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: This place serves home cooked no frill food and I think the best dish is roasted chicken. It was really juicy and the skin was crisp. Excellent! It's cheap too. We paid 350 baht for 4 dishes and a large beer (served with ice cubes ^^) So cheap!

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: I arrived around 3PM, there is a queue outside. You can come to counter and ask you menu to review first. Then when have table you just give your order to save time. …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Mouth watering plate of roasted pork and chicken. Paired with mushroom Tom Yum Soup and there you go, a delicious Thai-styled dinner.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: The chicken is moist and tender, but taste-wise, I don't think it's worth the hype I saw on TikTok. The flavor is decent, but nothing special. The must-try is definitely crispy papaya salad! Super delicious! I love this even more than the normal Som Tam

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: This place is an oldie but a goodie. Their chicken is the most famous in this part of Chiang Mai and all you have to do is order Kai Yang Cherng Doi. Their "yum" salads are not that amazing although delicious enough to get the general idea …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: The crispy skin roast chicken was so good! Tried the corn somtum too and it was good too. Prices were reasonable.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: มาใช้บริการที่นี่หลายครั้งรสชาติของอาหารดีโดยส่วนมากอาหารจะมีรสชาติเน้นให้กับลูกค้าต่างชาติมากกว่าส่วนไก่อร่อยดีสถานที่สะอาดบริการรวดเร็วแต่อยากให้พนักงานดูแลลูกค้าให้เร็วกว่านี้และมีการตอบโต้และยิ้มด้วยคือพนักงานไม่ค่อยยิ้มเลย

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
The portions are quite small for the price and there's no option of ordering a whole chicken, but quality wise it's very good. The chicken is very juicy and well seasoned. The mango salad was a bit sweet though and lacked pungency.
But for a Nimman location it's a reasonable option to satisfy your chicken cravings

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: If you are chicken lover, this restaurant is highly recommended! Should definitely try the crispy papaya salad and corn som tam as well. The price was reasonable, quite crowded during lunch time.

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: ร้านไก่ย่างหนังกรอบในตำนาน เป็นร้านประจำสมัยเรียนมหาลัยนานแล้ว แต่พอกลับไปทานก้อยังอร่อยเหมือนเดิม เมนูแนะนำ คือ ไก่ย่างหนังกรอบ ต้มแซ่บกระดูกอ่อนใบมะขาม ตำข้าวโพดไข่เค็ม อร่อยเลย😀😀👍 …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: I was a bit disappointed by the food here. The chicken was tasty and cooked well but it had quite a lot of gristle in it. The rice was dry and all clumped up and portions were quite small for the price. I can’t eat spicy food at the moment …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
I was a bit disappointed with our experience and won’t be visiting again.

Friendly staff and affordable food. …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: oh man, heavenly goodness. This place is a no-questions-asked, must in nimmanhaemin. Their kai yang nung krob (chicken, #1 on the menu) is crazy crisp on the outside and so so tender on the inside, and it’s only 80 bahts! …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text: Best restaurant in chiang mai for me. If you like spicy, ask red pepper and add to som tam and source which served with meat. …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
Review_Text:
Delicious roast chicken restauran👍
Affordable & Delicious 😋 …

Restaurant_Name: ไก่ย่างเชิงดอย
