Review_Text: Typical Thai place with a wide variety of Thai dishes. The food is authentic, flavorful, and reasonably priced. A great spot to try different local recipes in a simple, no-frills setting. Perfect for both locals and travelers looking for real Thai food. 🇹🇭🍜

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: ร้านอาหารตามสั่ง มีทัังก๋วยเตี๋ยว ข้าวต่างๆ สั่งกระเพราหมูกรอบไข่ดาว รสชาติอร่อยดี แต่หมูกรอบหั่นมาชิ้นเล็กๆไปหน่อย และ อยากให้เผ็ดกว่านี้นิดนึง โดยรวมคุ้มค่า คุ้มราคา เพราะอาหารแต่ละจาน 50-60 บาทเอง👍🏻

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text:
Aroi Dee was recommended by a local.

First impression, the food was great. Ordered a seafood noodle salad (80 baht) and a pad see ew (50 baht).

The pad see ew had a nice soy flavour and an underlying sweetness to it. Flat rice noodles were bouncy with a perfect texture. Added to it was pork and veggie.

The seafood salad had shrimps, squid, tomatoes and veggie with a kick to it. Noodles were instant noodles, but cooked al dente. Great chew.

Definitely come back again. Local feel and a great atmosphere. My Thai is good, so the lady came out to confirm my order. The dishes did not take long to come out at all.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text:
Great place to get a quick lunch - very local and authentic restaurant. All meals are 40-50B, prepared next to you from fresh ingredients and really tasty. Stuff is also very friendly.

Can’t recommend it enough!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Quite bland for Thai tongues and it feels like they tone down flavors to accommodate foreign customers. Big portions and friendly prices tho

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text:
This place is a must. The food is very delicious and so cheap. We went so often during our stay. I was so happy it was just in front of our airbnb.

The noodle soup, fried thick noodle and the morning glories are FABULOUS!

Almost everything is 40 bath so very cheap.

Do hesitate, Go you will not regret it.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Great little restaurant right by my hotel. The ladies there are nice. The cooking is good. My meal was 40 baht, and then I got a coke too for 20 baht. I will come back. Edit, I have returned, and so far, the pad thai with prawns was excellent and so was fried pork with basil

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Amazing, adorable, authentic. We spent a month in Chiang Mai and kept coming back to this place. Friendly staff and fast service. We could eat like kings for about $4 Canadian. The Panang curry, stir fried morning glory, and crispy pork are all so good. Go here! You won’t regret it!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text:
Update: we ended up eating here seven times across our 30 days in Chiang Mai. Nothing but great things to say about this place.

Not only is food extremely inexpensive, but they also provide free water, ice, and sometimes even free bananas.

They have tons of variety and across our seven visits were never out of anything.
—

We have eaten here five times in the last two weeks. They are open all day, so we have eaten both lunch and dinner here.

Food ranges from 35-50B and adding an egg or getting more steamed rice id 10B. They provide free drinking water and ice (and sometimes bananas!).

We have eaten and can recommend the following: pad kra pao 4x, pad see ew 3x, curry fried egg, & Chinese sausage fried rice

Service is friendly and food is fast (unless you come around 12:15--lunch rush). I'm sure we will come back at least five more times while we are in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: It seems like this local restaurant is recently relocated into this place. There is a good variety of food selections and it is very easy to order as everything has a picture attached. It is fast, cheap, and very affordable as most of the dishes are priced at 40thb to 50thb. it is definitely a very good addition to this area.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Huge variety of local Thai meals to be experienced here!  The pad see ew is fantastic and so is the fried kale. I’ll be making my way through the entire menu and with prices starting at 30 baht you won’t break the bank.  Free water provided and a bathroom exists in the premise. The chef speaks English as there are English menus. #BeatTheGrind

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: We were walking a long time to find a place like this. Traditional Thai food for very affordable prices. Good taste… recommend the Tom Yam Koong Nam Sai!

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Khao soi a unique local dish of chiang mai province, the broth has a herbal scent. the noodles are sometimes chewy, sometimes soft, sometimes hard, okay to eat. personally, I don't feel too special. 60 baht/dish

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: อาหารไทยตามสั่ง ราคาถูก รสชาติดี มีน้ำดื่มบริการฟรี

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Very good stir fried dishes at cheap prices. Cheaper when it comes with rice (but a smaller portion of the dish) but slightly more expensive when it’s the dish only (larger portions). Both fried calamari and holy basil with thousand year egg were good but I preferred the former.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Unhygienic food caused me stomachache. By the way, noone welcomes you and you have to order at the counter. The food is very oily and does not taste good at all.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Delicious seafood curry, as well spicy seafood salad and beef noodle soup. Good value and lots of menu options. Ingredients were very fresh and food was delivered quickly.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text:
We just came from the mountain looking for a cozy place to dine in and on the budget. We got surprised by how good it was for the price... If you go during the night don't be surprised if you don't see many people. Come in a enjoy, locals tend to just pass by to grab food and go.
It's not full of tourists (for now) which is a positive point.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Low key.  Delicious Beef Khao Soi.   Broth flavorful and not overly spicy.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: The exellent place to eat local food in Chiang Mai. The foods here is great taste and staff is friendly. Hidden gem of Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Not the cleanest place, but tasty and very cheap. Khao Soi for 30 baht. They are relocating soon to another spot.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Authentic Thai food, say no more.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Yummy cooking at very reasonable prices. Having plenty of seatings and serving also cold drinks and beers.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Ok so it’s not the cleanest place and the floor etc could use a good scrub and hosing but the food is really really good and inexpensive. You’ll notice that the locals eat here and the tourists eat next door. The battered fried squid alone is worth a visit. The food is cooked fresh right on front of you and comes out hot and fast. The good news is they are moving Feb 14 to new digs just 2 blocks south and around the corner.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text:
Great little eatery. I had my second meal there tonight, simple but tasty - garlic pork and rice, plus a big bottle of Leo ... 110 baht.
I'll keep coming back. 😁

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: A simple restaurant with many basic menu items. If you are looking for a well priced restaurant in this particular neighborhood, I would suggest stopping by.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: I just had the most delicious green curry seafood on rice. Absolutely the best tasting food I've had in weeks. Don't let the plain appearance scare you away. Fantastic food.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: The food here is great, the service is amazing. This restaurant looks like a dive, locals-only kind of place. But the food is fresh and we've enjoyed pretty much everything we've tried here. We particularly love their noodle soup and mixed vegetable plate (add a fried egg!)

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: It's a great place if you want great thai food, fast and cheap. It's not fancy, just a family business in a garage like place, but the food was absolutely amazing.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text:
Small restaurant I discovered in their previous location on the other side of Nimman. And they still deliver the same top food quality for a damn good price.
One of my go-to for daily meals !

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: ร้านเล็กๆ ดูธรรมดาๆ แต่รสชาติอาหารไม่ธรรมดา แม่ครัว 1 คนแต่ไม่ว่าลูกค้าจะเยอะแค่ใหน แม่ครัวก็สามารถจัดแจงในเวลาอันสั้น ราคาประหยัดจึงเป็นที่ฝากท้องของพนักงานแถวนี้ ไม่ต้องแปลกใจหากจะเห็นร้านเล็กๆ แต่คนแน่นร้านในช่วงกลางวัน

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Damn!!! You must try it if you can. Very delicious food and cheap/reasonable price. I love these chiefs, they always smile.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Great value, would go again.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text: Real Thai food, friendly service, run by a local Thai family, low prices around 30 to 50 Baht per dish and the owners also have a convenience shop full of drinks and snacks.

Review_Text: Go to place for lunch. You can opt out the chicken and replace it with veggies or tofu or egg which I love.

Restaurant_Name: ร้านอร่อยดี Aroi Dee
Review_Text:
숙소 근처라 그냥 들어가봤는데 가격도 님만해민치고는 저렴하고 맛도 괜찮았어요.
청결은 너무 기대하지마시고 그냥 로컬식당 다니시는분은 괜찮아요. 영어메뉴 있고 사진도 있습니다.
It was quite tasty and the price also not bad as you see it's located in nimmanhaemin area.
They have English menu with photos in it, so no problems in communicating. But don't expect the clean and neat place, it's just a local restaurant.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: This was our first meal in the city and definitely one of the best. We had Khao Suey Burger,Khaprao Sauce burger, Green Thai Sauce Sphagetti,French Fries and Blue Pea Lime juice. Khaprao sauce and Green Thai were spicy but tasty. We even packed two patties for later. This is definitely recommended for vegetarians, vegans around one nimman area. This shop is run by Rainy, a wonderful and friendly person to converse with.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
The Best Veggie Burgers in Chiang Mai – A True Hidden Gem!
We were so impressed by the food and the vibe at Rainy's Veggie Burgers that we simply had to come back the next day. This place is a true gem. The burgers are simple yet incredibly flavorful, with the patties being clearly homemade with love and care. It's the perfect, no-frills spot for a delicious and very affordable meal. The atmosphere is so cozy and welcoming, and Rainy herself is just the kindest and friendliest owner. This isn't just a place to eat—it feels like you're being welcomed into a friend's home. We're already looking forward to our next visit!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Rainy is doing such an amazing job with her business so it's not a surprise that her average score here is 5! The burgers and fries are really tasty plus I recommend to go for the butterfly lime juice, it's delicious! However, beside food, Rainy puts so much effort into making her guests to feel like they are at home that I honestly can't remember the last time I had such a pleasant experience when visiting a restaurant. On top of it all, the pricw of the food is very affordable and if you leave the tip, Rainy will make sure it gets donated to the nearest hospital.
Big love from Sinisa and Dragan, we will come back to Chiang Mai next year just to visit Rainy and taste some of the finest veggie burgers in Thailand.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
This little outdoor but covered restaurant in the Nimman neighborhood run by super sweet Rainy/Fon has really tasty fusion burgers and pasta.

Everything is apparently vegan except the buns (which unfortunately contain eggs; I urged her to find vegan buns).

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: I don’t normally eat burgers; however, I decided to try Rainy’s vegetarian burgers and I was not disappointed! I went for the one with green curry sauce, which had a two chilli heat rating, but it was perfectly balanced. Full of  flavours without being overpowering. The patty tasted fresh and homemade.  Rainy’s warm, genuine hospitality made the experience even better.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: rainys veggie burgers is such a hidden gem. she does a selection of vegetarian burgers with thai style flavours and they are so good! it was just us eating and she was so lovely, she wouldn’t let us tip and said she would give the rest to feeding the stray animals. i have never had such a genuine, positive dining experience, it felt like i was eating in someone’s home!! such a kind soul, go and try her tasty food 😋🍔🌱

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Great burgers, Rainy is very friendly, we felt welcome and comfortable. The food was unique, blending traditional Thai flavours to a modern vegetarian burger.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Delicious and affordable plant based burgers. The soy based Khao soi sauce burger was fantastic! The kaprao sauce is REALLY spicy but still yummy. Nice relaxed atmosphere. Rainy is the sweetest too! Definitely recommend

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Very lovely place. The veggie burgers are very original, all the food is fresh and organic. Also Rainy is one of the most lovely people I've ever met. Defenitely recommending this place. ❤

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: I love Rainy's Veggie Burgers. They are absolutely delicious. Very fresh ingredients, flavourful sauces, and the veggie patty is so crispy but moist and tasty. Quiet location with a nice view. Plus, Rainy is super kind and generous. Always providing us a nice conversation, help with thai, lots of smiles and fruit. Love you, Rainy! See you soon ka 🥰🙏🍔🍟

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: This is one of the best place for a vegetarian experience their burgers are too good. Specially the khao soi one where she prepare the sauce for about 3 hrs everyday and you can feel that quality in their taste.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Found this spot during some intense rain coincidentally. Rainy, owner, is the sweetest. Ordered tomyum veg burger (she gave me the perfect amount of spice) and thai tea with alternative milk option. She even brought me mint tea for no extra charge. All delicious and kind ingredients. The view is a quieter street, and the mountains in distance. Bless, i will be back

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Owner is humble, friendly and hospitable! Lovely burger with a twist of Thai! Support local business. 😋

I realised I didn’t pay for the lime juice, it was refreshing! 🥲

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
A *must* visit!!
Rainy's has delicious homestyle burgers made with care. The patties are incredible in texture, the flavours are wonderful. We would have come back the next day, if we could. Rainy is very kind and lovely. Really affordable, nutritious and nice to support a local businesswoman!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Burgers are so delicious especially with tomyum sauce! And garlic bun as well! Lime juice tastes so good!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Absolutely delicious burger and fried rice. So glad to find a vegetarian burger with tasty patty and affordable price. Also it looks nutritious. The owner Rainy is so friendly and nice. I will be coming back again soon.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Amazing veggie burgers for a great price! I got two burgers, one with Khao Soi sauce and the other with Kra Pao sauce. Both were great, but the Khao Soi sauce was my favorite. Rainy is a really nice and welcoming chef with a passion for cooking. Thanks for the great service and food!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Visiting from Seattle, USA!

Our last meal in Chiang Mai was at Rainy's, and it was wonderful! The honey lime drink was SO GOOD in the afternoon heat. We had the green curry burger and tom yum burger, both were so flavorful! The 7 grains burger is really nice; Great texture and very satisfying. The garlic buns are special, too; Oven roasted garlic and spices make it fluffy, a little sweet and flavorful.  We also got to try a new dessert with fresh coconut, tapioca, and pandan that was really refreshing.

The venue is a cute covered area with nice plants, and nice, chill view.

Rainy is a fantastic person and cook to share an afternoon with, we are so happy we stopped in for lunch here before continuing our travel.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: คุณภาพเกินราคาสุดๆ เบอร์เกอร์มีทั้งซอสต้มยำ ซอสผัดไทย ซอยกะเพรา ฯลฯ เจ้าของทำเอง อร่อยมาก  เจ้าของเป็นมิตรและใจดีสุดๆ แนะนำค่ะ

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Wow, these reviews do not lie! Not only is the food here healthy but this place has some of the most delicious veggie burgers I've ever tasted! I would say even if you're not vegetarian, it's worth giving this place a try. The restaurant feels like a wonderful family owned restaurant and everyone here is super friendly. I'll definitely be coming back here again soon!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Excellent burger
Delicious khao soi sauce
Totally recommend
Yum yum, enjoy!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Super good veggie burger in tomyum sauce💯
Superb service by Rainy herself♥️
Don't miss this Nimman hidden gem✨

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Delicious veggie burger 🍔😍❤️👍🏻🙏🏻 we had the tomyum sauce and it was the perfect spice level Yummy 😋🌱❤️👍🏻🙏🏻 butterfly pea lime tea was also excellent. Highly recommended to make the short walk and avoid the crowds and queues 👍🏻👍🏻(even though today was closed, we called ahead and the owner kindly opened for us. They also have a new homestay for groups of up to 8 persons)

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: A fantastic veggie burger in Chiang Mai, with the friendliest owner. She was actually closed but saw us peering in and kindly opened up just for us and proceeded to make us the most delicious veggie burgers. We got three for the two of us Tom Yum, Kaprao and Green Curry and all of them were fantastic. As a lifelong vegetarian I hate the veggie burgers that try to emulate meat, and the burgers here are exactly the kind I like - decidedly vegetarian in flavor and texture. We’ll definitely be going back.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
วันนี้ได้แวะมาทานอาหารที่ร้านนี้ ต้องบอกเลยว่าประทับใจตั้งแต่คำแรกจนคำสุดท้าย ทั้งรสชาติอาหาร การจัดจาน และที่สำคัญคือ “ความใส่ใจจากเจ้าของร้าน” ที่ทำให้มื้อนี้อบอุ่นและพิเศษมากยิ่งขึ้น

🍝 สปาเกตตี้ซอสมะเขือเทศ
รสชาติเข้มข้น ซอสมะเขือเทศหอมกลิ่นออริกาโน เส้นลวกมาอย่างพอดี ทานคู่กับผักสดที่เพิ่มความสดชื่นได้ดี

🍳 ชุดไข่ดาวโปรตีนแน่น
สายไข่ต้องฟิน! ไข่ดาวทอดหลายฟองเรียงกันอย่างน่าทาน เสิร์ฟพร้อมผักสดและไส้เบอร์ตรงกลาง ฟินแบบได้ทั้งโปรตีนและความอร่อย

👨‍🍳 บริการจากใจ
เจ้าของร้านน่ารักมาก ใส่ใจลูกค้า ยิ้มแย้ม พูดคุยเป็นกันเอง รู้สึกเหมือนมากินข้าวบ้านเพื่อน บรรยากาศอบอุ่นสุด ๆ

✨ สรุป
อาหารอร่อย บริการดีเยี่ยม ราคาน่ารัก เหมาะกับทั้งมื้อเช้าและมื้อกลางวัน เป็นร้านที่อยากกลับมาซ้ำอีกแน่นอน!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Tastiest veggie burgers in Chiang Mai! A super lovely restaurant with very nice vibes - I'd definitely recommend visiting if you're near by. :)

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Awesome place! Burgers are very tasty and the owner is absolutely the sweetest and kindest person. She also sells bagged corn, sweet potato and banana chips.
So yummy!

You should definitely visit if you come to Chiang Mai!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Good selections in their menu. Their burgers are great. Prices are great and the lady owner is very friendly. I'll come back to try more of their selections.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Vegetarian burger, choices of tomyum, green curry and tomato sauce. I got the tomyum and tried their coca milk. The burger is made from 7 grains as well as soy products. A nice and peaceful place to eat before getting back to work. The boss was nice and friendly. Burger taste great as well. Not too costly as well. She gave a complementary butterfly pea.

The staff recommended me 2 temples that closes at 8pm good for a late visit.

Wat Doi Suthep, very beautiful at night 🌃

Wat Santitham a beautiful temple as well.

Last one closes at 5pm but it's good for meditation Wat Ram Peong, open for meditation for anyone and everyone.

Overall an amazing experience here, the food taste awesome

Second meal was great too I got green curry burger with butterfly pea and lime drink. You have to like spicy for the curry burger and sour for the butterfly pea lime

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Tonight we visited Rainy's Veggie Burgers and, as the other reviews state as well, it is indeed a great place. Great food, cooked and served by the loveliest person we've met on our entire trip. Would recommend it to everyone!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Delicious burgers! I loved the khao soi sauce and the classic french fries.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
ดีใจมากๆๆๆๆ ที่ได้เจอร้านเบอร์เกอร์ที่อร่อยขนาดนี้
ที่ร้านมีซอสให้เลือกหลายแบบ นี่ลองซอสต้มยำ อร่อยมากกกก แปลกใหม่สุดๆ มีซอสไทยๆอย่างอื่นอีกนะ กระเพรา เขียวหวาน น่าสนใจมาก
คราวหน้ามาเชียวใหม่ ไม่พลาดแน่นอน
แถมพี่เจ้าของน่ารักมาก อัธยาศัยดีสุดๆ

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: The vibes here are super friendly! The shop owner is so kind and generous. She not only cooks the burgers but also warms my heart. I definitely want to bring my family to this restaurant. The vegan burgers are amazing! It was my first time trying them, and it was so good. If you’re vegetarian, you will love it! And if you’re not, just give it a try! The garlic bread also delicious! ❤️— บรรยากาศร้านเป็นกันเองมาก พี่ฝนที่เป็นเจ้าของร้านดูแลอบอุ่นมากค่ะ เบอร์เกอร์ก็อร่อยมากๆค่ะ เป็นครั้งแรกที่ลองทานเบอร์เกอร์มังสวิรัติ ประทับใจมาก คนที่ไม่ทานมังสวิรัติก็สามารถทานได้ เอนจอยกับรสชาติแน่นอนค่ะ 🍔⭐️

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Highly recommend this place.

Vegan burgers done right and at a very good value. Iordered on grab and came back the next day to get some more.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Best Veg burger in the world. Rainy is an awesome cook too- Yahu 😊❣️

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: A relaxing Thai atmosphere with a very friendly host! The sauces and homemade burgers were incredibly tasty. Even the way she put down the plates was done gently and with love. A must visit place for a vegetarian

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: As a meat eater, I think Rainy‘s burgers are one of the best in Chiang Mai. And Rainy herself is really nice too. Recommend!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Best place in Chiang Mai. Rainy is an amazing host.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
The burgers here were so delicious that I ended up coming every day!
Rainy is such a wonderful person.
I’ll definitely come back to eat here again next time I’m in Chiang Mai.
Thank you!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Absolutely love Rainy's Veggie Burger place! We got a Tom Yum vegan burger and butterfly pea lime lemonade which was delicious. A lovely and quiet place to sit and admire the view and have a chat with Rainy.  A hidden gem!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Wow!!! Yummy!!! Must visit!!!

I love this place! Had the best Thai milk tea and vegetarian burger in Chiangmai! Homemade, fresh and yummy!! Served with love! Prices also very reasonable and cheap!

The owner is very nice and cute! Pleasure to know her and talk to her! Highly recommend this place!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
! The host Rainy is exceptionally kind and makes you feel at home. The veggie burgers are homemade, tasty, and very affordable.
Tnx Rainy for a wonderful experience ❤️

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: We were firstly greeted by the loviest, Rainy - she was so kind, welcoming and friendly. We waited not long for our food and drinks, with a beautiful view of the sunset over the hills. The atmosphere of Rainy’s Veggie Burgers is very calming and relaxing due to it being in a nice sheltered area with lots of green plants which we love!! The burgers came and it was ohhhh so tasty. Everything about it. All the flavours bounced off eachother and complemented eachother really well - i had the tomyum sauce with my burger. The drinks were delicious of course… Rainy has lines that she grew in her garden! 🤩 We would 100% come to eat and chill here again when we are in the area again! You should defiantly come and get some food here if you are looking. Thank you so much Rainy!!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Stopped in at Rainy's on our stay in Chiang Mai and really enjoyed the burgers and lime juice. I had Tom Yum sauce on my burg
er which was a good mild to medium spice level. The lettuce and tomato were crisp and fresh, the veggie patty had good flavor.  The lime juice she made was absolutely delicious. If we had stayed longer we would have visited again, and I'm not even vegetarian (husband is). Recommend!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Great affordable local burger place, with a choice of several unique sauces for 55-65 baht. The owner was exceptionally nice and friendly and the food was delicious, 10/10!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
First meal my kids have eaten all of it and wanted more!
Delicious veggie burgers, so tasty and perfect spice! We will be back for sure! 🥰

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: All vegetarian options. Food is prepared with much care and everything is delicious. The owner is super sweet with everything. If you are lucky, you can also get fresh papaya for sale and if you are super lucky you can get papaya for testing as well 😄

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
ร้านคาเฟ่เล็กๆอบอุ่นน่ารักๆในพื้นที่หน้าบ้านเปิด10:00-19:00เจ้าของร้านน่ารักเป็นกันเองเฟรนลี่สุดไปเมื่อไหร่ชวนคุยด้วยตลอดคุยเก่งถามไถ่ดี ราคาน่ารักไม่แพงเมนูก็มีหลากหลายอาหารสปาเกตตี้เบอร์เกอร์ขนมปังกระเทียม ต้มยำ เมนูเครื่องดืีมเยอะมากๆกาแฟดำ กาแฟอเมริกาโน่  อเมริกาโน่ใส่น้ำส้ม ชาเย็นชาเขียว น้ำสมุนไพร มะตูม กระเจี๊ยบใบบัวบก น้ำส้ม
กาแฟสกัดเย็น

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: ร้านนี้รสซอสอร่อยเว่อออออเ โดยเฉพาะซอสกระเพราแซ่บมาก ไม่คิดว่าจะมีที่ไหนขายเบอร์แล้วทำ ซอสไทยๆแบบนี้มาขาย นี่เจ้าแรกที่เจอเลยค่ะ😭😭😭 ใว้ครั้งหน้าเจออีกแน่ค่ะ!!! …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Delicious vegan burgers in a lovely setting with the friendliest owner and chef! What a special little place - we will definitely be back!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: What a wonderful establishment and amazing lady behind the counter who served me. I had the awesome vegetarian tomyum (spicy) burger with fries and it was yummy. Prices were a bargain. You have to honestly come here even if you're not a veggie!!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Rainy's Burger is the best vegetarian burger I've ever tried. It's crunchy and nutritious, and the sauces are nice, I love the Tom Yum and Kaprao ones. Not only burgers, but I also personally love her garlic bread, thai tea, and lime juice, etc. (lime juice is very recommended). Rainy's also very friendly. I can tell how much she loves her job while we enjoy our food. Keep up the good work!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Homely little spot where you're welcomed with incredible warmth. Delicious homemade burgers and refreshing freshly made sodas/teas.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Really nice burgers. Made with fresh vegetables and a homemade patty. A nice twist using Thai sauces. Extremely well priced. Felt really well looked after. Oh and the lime shake is next level.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: great burgers made with so much love! i highly recommend both the tomyum sauce and the kaprao sauce (not too spicy!)

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Thai fusion burgers อร่อยทุกรส แม่ค้าน่ารักมากกกก ใจดีมากกกกกกๆค่ะ ❤️

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Rainy's Veggie Burgers is truly one of those hidden gems you find when you wander the quieter streets. The food and drinks are truly delicious and very reasonably priced. As you enjoy your meal you have a lovely mountain view too.
The owner, Rainy, is such a lovely, friendly lady and you can see she gets great joy from providing wonderful and healthy food.
I will return, often. 🙏😃💃

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Delicious veggie burgers and prices are very low! Had one to start then ordered a second one because it was too good☺️ Rainy was very nice as well, would 100% recommend

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
อร่อยมากค่ะ พี่เจ้าของร้านน่ารัก ราคาดี บรรยากาศสบายๆ เหมาะกับการพักผ่อนกับอาหารอร่อย
The foods are very tasty! The owner is so kind and tender. Atmosphere and ambiance are relax. 🫶🏼🫰🏼🩷

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: A must-stop for all vegetarians. Come for the burgers, stay for the atmosphere. Rainy is a wonderful person. 10/10!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Really tasty vegan burgers, and the addition of sauces like Khao Soi is super delicious. They also have appetizers and tasty drinks. The place is pleasant and peaceful, with a view of Doi Suthep mountain. Rain, the owner, is a very kind and welcoming woman

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Burger สายวีแกน ราคาน่าตกใจ

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: If i could give more stars I would! The burgers are amazing and there is a variety of sauces to choose! Atmosphere is great, it's a quiet place hidden in the alleys so gives you a cozy feeling. The owner is super sweet and friendly!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Delicious vegetarian burger and even better company 🙏 the owner is very friendly and even talked to me about meditation. Also, the Mountain View was priceless. Recommend !

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Hidden gem burger place! We had the Tom Yum burger and Tomato Sauce burger. The burger patties are perfectly fried "7 grains" (made from beans, rice, peanut, and some others) patty with great texture and hearty bean flavor. The sauces she puts on the burgers are homemade and pack a delicious kick. Definitely got to try the Tom Yum burger if you like spicy foods. The owner is a very sweet lady. We will go back to try the rest of the burgers!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: I didn’t get a photo because we ate the delicious burgers too quickly! This spot is a hidden gem. Rainy is incredibly kind and an exceptional chef! A must visit in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Great local place to have veggie burgers with local spices like green curry and khaosoi. Good view over Doi Suthep to enjoy at sundown

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
What a place guys!! One of the best in Chiang Mai!!

It is an amazing family restaurant, run by one of the sweetest lady we have ever met!
The burgers are just amazing and that too in Thai flavour like Tom Yum, Khao Soi, Tomato, Pad thai and believe me guys those were like the best burgers I ever had! Super tasty patty, super fresh tomato/onion/lettuce and super soft bun!
All this at super affordable price of 55-65 THB!

They also have great Thai milk tea, honey lime and other drinks!

Please visit this place if you hungry for tasty burgers and support the sweet lady :)

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Great service and atmosphere at Rainy’s Café. Delicious vegetarian food that can be made vegan. Take away or dine in options at a local price. Lactasoy available as a milk alternative. พี่ฝน is hospitable and makes a quick and healthy meal for you. Please sit and enjoy the open air restaurant. คนไทยต้องลอง เบอร์เกอร์ซอสกระเพราอร่อยมากๆค่ะ

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: This little vegetarian burger joint is a must visit in Nimman!! The burger itself was well prepared with all the fixings and was a culinary fusion with a Thai flare. The owner was absolutely fantastic and stayed open late for us. She brought us various homemade sauces to sample on our fries and onion rings. The chili garlic sauce (not its name) is a must try!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Handcrafted veggie burgers with a bean base, quite good. Excellent sauce options, krapow is the best.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: The staff is incredibly welcoming, and the burger with Green Curry sauce is absolutely delicious! Easily the best burger and Butterfly Pea tea I've had in Thailand—highly recommend!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Absolutely delicious veggie burgers served by a very sweet Lady! A must visit in Chiang Mai!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: We are not vegetarian but wow great sauces and burgers , great value 65B .

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Friendly hostess, we had two excellent veggie hamburgers and french fries. Highly recommended!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: What a great little place! Rainey (Phon) is soooo lovely - what a kind and friendly person! You feel immediately like you have made a friend :) Also the burgers are fantastic - we had the Khao soi and phad kapow sauces and they were both …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Amazing vegan burger ! We ordered burger with green curry and Tom yum sauce.

The owner is very kind. She noticed that we felt hot during the meal, she gave us iced tea for free. The banana chips are also delicious too!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Very good and tasty vegetarian burger and iced drinks for little money. Tasty and very friendly! :)

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Great vegan burgers with special thai sauces. Located in a quiet area very close to the busy Nimman street, and the owner is an amazing person. Highly recommended!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
These burgers are amazing! Can’t believe they took me so long to find.

The nice lady has had the restaurant six months. I had the Tomyum and gren curry …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Rainy is the sweetest women you will ever meet. I'm so happy I met her! Amazing wholesome experience, she puts so much love and good energy into her restaurant 🧡🙏 …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Great little veggie burger place with the friendliest owner. She brought us samples of the other sauces to try while we ate and some peaflower water. Would definitely suggest finding your way into this little back ally if you're in the area.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: I kept returning to Rainy's restaurant during my two week stay in Chiang Mai. The food is delicious and affordable, and Rainy and her family are incredibly warm and generous; dining there always lifted my spirits. As I was learning Thai, …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: We came for a late lunch. The lady was so sweet and helpful. Honestly one of the best vegan burgers. The sauces are delicious. I wish I could have brought some home. My favourite is the Khao Soi one. The lemonade was also very good. If I’m ever in Chiang Mai again, I’ll come visit for sure! Don’t skip on this place.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Fantastic veggie burgers in a nice setting! The owner is so sweet and we really had a great time. Highly recommend!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: One of our favorite experiences in Chiang Mai has been meeting Fon (Rainy). We just keep coming back. The food and drinks are so tasty (aroi mak!). Fon shines with kind and loving energy and it is evident she enjoys what she does so much! …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Cute little place in the corner, almost hidden.
Veggies Pattie’s are made from 7 grains and all sauces are house made and local Thai flavours. Friendly and great service.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Full on lovely. I'm making my way through Rainy's menu - both the  Kaprao and Khao Soi burgers were so delicious! I don't know what magic is involved, but the flavours are perfect. Also, Phueng is the nicest human!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Fantastic place. Great food. Love it. It will be a regular stop while I am in Chiang Mai.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Great burgers, great views and great vibes what more could you ask for! Thanks Rainy

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Wonderful homemade burgers with several sauce options all cooked to perfection. Off the beaten track but close by. Would give the burgers and Rainy 6 stars.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
Great vegan burger and cold brew coffee 👍
Home cafe, sabai mak, I like it, totally recommended …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text:
As an Indian and Vegetarian, this was the best Burger Joint in Chiang Mai.
Rainy is super sweet and kind. The Burgers are homely and fulfilling

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Probably the best veggie burgers in town and very affordable !

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Excellent burgers and location and host. Great energy.  Must try for vegetarians in Chiang mai...

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Absolutely amazing little restaurant in the backyard of the owner's home. The food is super tasty and the owner is incredibly attentive. She even brought some extra things just for me to try. …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Burgers are delicious, I tried Kaprao Sauce and Khao Soi, french fries were very tasty too.  I loved very charming service of the owner. Definitely recommend this place

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Such a lovely spot! The proprietor (also chef and namesake?) is so wonderfully kind and friendly, offering us one delicious dish after another. Even offered us free fruit from her mother's garden, cut and dished to serve. Love it here. Will always support.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Hidden gem! Tasty burgers and cheap as well! The lady who runs it is lovely as well! Vegan friendly 🌱 …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Great food in a very nice covered outdoor area. Rainy is a very sweet lady and took very good care of us. You can't go wrong with these burgers!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: This pleasant courtyard has a very kind and friendly owner who cooks everything by herself and the atmosphere is very family friendly with a wonderful view of Doi Suthep. You can order delicious vegan burgers, wonderful spaghetti and a variety of healthy drinks

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Found this sweet gem today, the burger was so delicious I forgot to take a photo, I ordered the one with curry sauce as it was the spiciest on the menu, it’s a home made hamburger patty (7 grains)  with your choice of about 5 different sauces, and fresh iced herbal teas available.. will come back for more

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Food is amazing good cook and the owner is very nice and friendly . We love it

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Kind of in the middle of nowhere and you'll probably not find it unless recommended, but it's really a hidden gem. The owner is super sweet and the food is tasty. Try it out if you get the chance to!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Very tasty vegetarian green curry burger. The owner is super nice and smiley, we got free dessert too 🙂 …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: This place is a hidden gem for vegan/vegetarian 😍 the owner is such a lovely lady who just loves to share!! Even though the price is cheap, her food is delicious 💚 we’ll definitely be back for more!!! …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Excellent food and service. The lemonade, burgers, fries, everything was excellent.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Great green curry and tomyum veggie burgers! Lovely owner. We are regulars now :)

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Amazing and the sweetest service ever! Vegetarian or not you should try it! The seasoning is incredible.

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Beautiful spot to grab a quick and affordable vegetarian meal, great service and great food!

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: Amazing food, atmosphere and staff! Highly recommend

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: All of the previous reviews are right! Delicious and healthy burgers and the nicest owner ever🙏🏼🌞 …

Restaurant_Name: Rainy's Veggie Burgers
Review_Text: It's a tiny, terrace-style restaurant in a garage run by a kind-hearted owner. I heard the burger buns contain egg, so I just ordered the patty. The khao soi sauce was spicy and delicious. The fries, fried with herbs, were absolutely delicious. The drinks were also excellent, so I recommend ordering one as well.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: The ambiance is great, the cats are super well-behaved, and all the staff members adore them. The food here is delicious too—especially the beef, which is perfectly tender, and it only costs 190 baht, such a great deal! The grilled salmon is a bit overcooked, but the rice is fragrant and tasty. I’ll definitely come back just for the beef.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Uncle Kani is a lovely, quiet spot in Chiang Mai. One of the highlights is their three super cute cats which make the place feel extra cozy and welcoming.

The food is great — we really enjoyed the beef fried rice, steak, and salad. Everything was tasty and affordable. We actually went there twice during our stay,and the second visit was even better. The rice came out hotter and the overall flavor was improved.✔️

If you’re looking for a calm place with good food and a relaxedmosphere (plus adorable cats), Uncle Kani is definitely worth a visit

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
ร้านเล็กๆที่บรรยากาศอบอุ่น
อาหารอร่อย สเต็กย่างมาดี กินคู่กับข้าวผัดมันเนื้อ+ไข่ดอง ลงตัวสุดๆ

ปล.ร้านมีแมวนะ

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
lovely place & lovely comfort food! i went here for dinner with my husband & ordered the beef fat fried rice, hashbrown, aus ribeye, peach tea, ginger ale, and the caramel custard thing (shaped heart, so cute). all are tastes nice!

bonus: they had 2 lovely cats hehe. as a cat lover, this is like +10000000 aura! must visit when you are in chiang mai.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: Tranquil atmosphere, with nice music not a large menu (which is a good sign), the food was delicious and the steak meat was grilled medium rare in my dish, I also had the egg on top. It had a great chilled ambience too. At the end when going to pay they have free cat stickers 😂, unique little spot and a bit of a gem in Chiang Mai. Highly recommend. I think we will be coming back ! I want to check out their coffee!

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
A small restaurant that serves delicious food. Very specialised menu. Location is a bit tucked away in a local neighbourhood.

The food is great and cooked perfectly. Portion was a bit small so I would recommend to upgrade the beef and tallow fried rice.

Tables are limited, and they frequenly sell out their menu. So arrive early. Also it is a place to enjoy your meal but not to linger since other people will be waiting for your seat.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: Been saved on my Google Maps for some time and finally went. Had the steak with beef fat fried rice with pickled egg and soy sauce and it was all cooked to perfection with perfect flavour. Cute little place, gave me small speakeasy vibes, with great soul/reggae style tunes playing. How they can do Australian steak cheaper than you can get in Australia, I’ll never know, but grateful to be able to get delicious food at a great price. Will be back!

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: ร้านเล็ก ๆ น่ารัก มาลองชิมข้าวหน้าเนื้อ เมนู recommend ไม่ผิดหวัง แซวม่อนย่างดี ข้าวมีความหอมกระเทียม แฮชบราวน์ มีให้เลือกทอด 2 แบย คือ deep fry กับ หม้อลม วันนี้เลือกแบบ deep fry หรอบกำลังกี ไม่อมน้ำมัน ฏดยรวมแล้ว รสชาติอาหาร กับ ราคา เหมะสม อยากให้มาลองกัน

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
Ordered the beef fat fried rice + steak, egg yolk and hash brown. Steak is good, rice is slightly mushy for me and hash brown has a slightly thick batter— nothing special. The soy sauce egg yolk with garlic went well with the beef steak rice!

Went at 6.30pm and it was full so we sat at the bar table. Atmosphere was really cosy with jazz music. A lot of decor around! Overall a nice vibe :)

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
This is a tiny restaurant, so make sure you make reservations, eat your meal, and move it along when you're done, so other people have the joy of eating here.

First of all, they have TWO cats in shirts who manage the dining room - which is AMAZING.

Everything is clean and tidy. The servers are prompt. The food was fresh and flavorful. We ordered a variety of things to try, and every single item was delicious.

I'm so glad we had dinner here.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: อยู่เชียงใหม่ค่ะแต่พึ่งมาเจอร้านนี้ ร้านสวยนะคะ ชิลๆอบอุ่นดี เพลงชิลๆ อาหารอร่อยคุณภาพดีมาก ร้านมีน้องแมวตุ้ยนุ้ยอยู่แต่น้องไม่มากวนนะคะ ไล่อ่านรีวิวของร้านมาจนถึงตอนนี้ร้านปรับได้ดีเลยค่ะ สำหรับเราที่มาครั้งแรกคือไม่ติดอะไรเลยกับร้าน เพราะอาหารรอไม่นานเกินไป 15 นาที รสชาติดี ถือว่าโอเค **ร้านจะจอดรถลำบากนิดนึงเพราะซอยเล็ก แต่มีที่จอดใกล้ๆร้าน

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: Wow! The steak with beef fat rice is unreal! 🔥 I would rate this as one of the best dishes / meals I’ve ever eaten anywhere seriously (and I’m from London so have a lot of good food available). The steak was cooked to perfection and the rice is so tasty. The price is great and owners were very friendly. Really smart vibe inside and nice trendy, young local crowd. I’ll be coming back here several more times before I leave Chiang Mai without a doubt ❤️ RECOMMEND

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: จัดเป็นอีกหนึ่งร้านเนื้อโปรดที่มาเชียงใหม่แล้วต้องมากิน ข้าวหน้าเนื้อกระเทียม กับ สเต็กเนื้อริปอายคือ the best อร่อยแบบที่ควรไปซ้ำ แนะนำให้จองก่อน เพราะโต๊ะไม่เยอะ แต่รับรองไม่ผิดหวัง

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
ตามจากรีวิว ข้าวผัดมันเนื้ออร่อยจริง ถึงจะราคาแรงแต่อร่อยก็ไม่เสียดาย เนื้อทำได้ดีไม่เหนียว กินคู่กับไข่ดองอร่อย ตัวข้าวมีรสชาติอยู่แล้วใครไม่ชอบเค็มอย่าเผลอราดน้ำดองไข่ลงไป
การสั่งเป็นระบบสแกนสั่ง ร้านบรรยากาศร้านดี ไปกินตอนบ่ายสามไม่มีคนเลย ชิวๆ ให้10/10
ที่จอดอาจจะยากหน่อยซอยแคบ นี่นอน รร ใกล้ๆ เลยเดินมา

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: This was a 10/10 dining experience and I’m so glad we came! Food was absolutely delicious and the whole atmosphere and vibe were amazing. Great music and cute kitty on top! Need to reserve at least one day in advance, keep that in mind.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: Beef served on tasty beef’s fat fried rice, cooked to perfection in a Japanese style. Simple and delicious. Short, but thoughtful wine list - mostly organic and nature. The atmosphere is peaceful and homy, gently rocked on that rainy day by a Keith Jarret solo concert album played on a warm analog vintage sound system. Excellent value for money.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
We were recommended this place by a friend — a humble little eatery tucked away from the busy tourist areas. It’s quiet, peaceful, and the food is absolutely delicious.

We ordered two dishes: the soy sauce egg and the beef rice bowl, as shown in the photo. The flavors were perfectly balanced. The soy sauce for the egg was incredible — they somehow prepared it in a way that made me want to drink it by the spoonful! And when poured over the beef rice, it was simply amazing. The egg itself was also rich and beautifully soft. We came back several times — that’s how good it was!

They also serve coffee during the day, and it looks fantastic in the photos — we’re planning to come back to try it.

Note: we just walked in without a reservation. However, the place only seats a maximum of about 14 people, so if you're coming with a group, it's a good idea to book in advance.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: If you’re in Chiang Mai and love hearty, flavorful meals, Uncle Kani’s beef rice is a must-try. The beef is tender, juicy, and perfectly seasoned, while the rice is light, fluffy, and goes beautifully with the sauce. The place is simple and cozy, with a friendly, welcoming vibe. Comfort food at its finest — I’d come back here anytime!

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
ข้าวผัดมันเนื้ออร่อยมากกกกกแบบมากๆๆๆๆ แสงออกปาก ✨🫶🏻
- ในร้านมีบอสแมว 1 ตัว (น้องชื่อสเต็ก) เดินไปเดินมาฮีลใจได้ดี 🤍🐱 เปิดประตูระวังน้องออกด้วยนะค้าบบ
- ร้านเล็กๆ ไม่ใหญ่มาก ไม่รองรับคนเยอะ แต่บรรยากาศอบอุ่น เหมาะมาเดท หรือกินข้าวพูดคุย ไม่เสียงดังโวยวาย
- รออาหารไม่นานมากนัก สแกนสั่ง
- รถยนต์อาจหาจอดยากหน่อย
- มอไซด์จอดร่วมหอพักได้

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
The best wagyu in Chiang Mai!

This place has such a unique charm, it feels more like dining in a stylish friend’s home rather than a typical restaurant. It’s a true gem in the neighborhood.

The owners, a lovely couple, own and run the place themselves, making everything with care. Their kindness and attention to detail make the experience even more special.

Highly recommended!

I visit this place at least twice a week.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: ร้านรสชาติดีมากๆ อร่อยทุกคำเลยครับ บริการดี ยิ้มแย้มแจ่มใส มีน้องเหมียวคอยต้อนรับด้วย

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: ร้านเนื้อสเต็กที่ดี เนื้ออร่อยมาก ไม่เหนียว นุ่มกำลังดี แนะนำข้าวผัดมันเนื้อหน้าเนื้อ น้อนแมวน่ารัก ตกแต่งร้านเล็กๆอบอุ่น มีเมนูเครื่องดื่ม ชา กาแฟด้วย แนะนำจองโต๊ะก่อนล่วงหน้า 1 วันเนื่องจากที่นั่งจำกัก ร้านค่อนข้างหายาก ตั้งอยู่ตรงมุมถนนพอดี จอดรถตรงถนนใหญ่ก่อนถึงแยกร้านแล้วเดินมาค่ะ

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: We reached at 7:25pm and were disappointed for a second when we saw that the “closed” sign was already up (online says that last order is until 7:30pm or sold out). Luckily, the owner saw us and allowed for one last order as there was only 2 of us, which we are super thankful for. We wanted a light dinner as we have been eating all day and ordered just 1 portion of the beef fat fried rice + beef steak (also added extra protein) to share. Also added one marinated soy sauce egg yolk and crispy hash browns. Everything tasted so good we gobbled everything up so quickly. We are very happy we managed to try this place and would totally come back again!!!

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: Uncle Kani is always of incredible quality and consistency. We came here on the first night of our one month stay for dinner and after tasting the steak bowl with beef fat rice and an added egg yolk we were already planning to return every week. The pork bowl, hashbrowns and sausage are each a highlight of their own as well. The owners are kind and take much care in everything they do. The atmosphere is a cozy and inviting space that is well designed, always paired with great music selected by the owner. The cats are also precious. Uncle Kani is one of the places we will miss the most from our travels.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
อาหารโอเคราคาไม่แพงมาก สเต็กเนื้อ อร่อย ไข่ดองรสชาติดีแต่น้ำดองเค็มไปหน่อย เราเทราดข้าว เลยทำให้ข้าวเค็มไปเลย มีพนักงานแมว สลับกันออกมาต้อนรับ

ร้านเล็กๆประมาณ 5 โต๊ะ ตกแต่งน่ารักดูอบอุ่น เราไปวันธรรมดาช่วงกลางวัน ไม่มีคน แต่ถ้าวันหยุดอาจจะต้องจองก่อน

ไม่มีที่จอดรถ แมปพาเราเข้าซอยแคบมาก โผล่ข้างร้านน แล้วหาร้านไม่เจอ

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
Food: Good, above average - I ordered salmon steak with garlic fried rice (฿260). The salmon, while not exhibiting a strong flavour, was crispy on the outside and soft and juicy on the inside. The garlic fried rice was very good, being chewy with a subtle garlic taste.

Service: Good, above average - Looks like the owner did the service. Polite and friendly.

Atmosphere: Very good - Well decorated in the mid-century style. Lots of film cameras. Had a turntable.

Plus: There was a cat 🐱

Note: Should make a reservation in advance.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
ร้านตกแต่งสไตล์บาร์ & คาเฟ่ เราเคยเห็นรีวิวมา เลยตั้งใจจะไปกิน Sirloin steak แต่เสียดายหมด (แนะนำให้จองล่วงหน้าจะดีกว่าค่ะ)

เลยสั่งเมนู
- Beef fat fried rice + beef steak อร่อยมาก แนะนำเมนูนี้ต้องลองค่ะ แค่ข้าวผัดมันเนื้ออย่างเดียวก็อร่อย อิ่ม
- ไข่ดอง  ไข่มัน นัว อร่อย กินคู่กับข้าวเนื้อเข้ากันมาก เราราดน้ำดองด้วยให้รสที่อร่อยอีกแบบค่ะ (ระวังเค็ม)
- แตงกวาดอง อร่อย

ที่ร้านมีน้องแมวมาเดินต้อนรับลูกค้า น้องมีที่นอนส่วนตัวกับตุ๊กตาปลาทู น่ารัก… ร้านค่อนข้างแคบ แต่ชอบการตกแต่ง รวมถึงไฟโทนส้ม

เราไปช่วงเย็นของวันสุดสัปดาห์ คนยังไม่ค่อยเยอะ พอมีโต๊ะว่าง แต่แนะนำให้สอบถามทางร้านก่อนค่ะ :)
ร้านค่อนข้างหายาก ต้องมองดี ๆ ไม่อย่างนั้นจะกลมกลืนกับตึก และไม่มีที่จอดรถยนต์นะคะ

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: We went there for dinner and the food was just amazing. I had a steak with the most amazing seasoning. It is a a MUST visit when you are in Chiang Mai. I also love the chill cat that is hanging out inside.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: I eat here at least 3 times a week - it's that good! So hard to find places with good quality meat in Chiang Mai, but the owners here source such fresh ingredients and meat and it tastes incredible. Salmon and beef bowls are my go-tos. My favourite restaurant in Chiang Mai hands down 💘

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
Best restaurant I’ve visited in Chiang Mai!!
I love the vibe and the interior design here.
The food is good and you can feel the chef is dedicated to making them.
Highly recommended and would definitely come back next time!!

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
ร้านตกแต่งน่ารักกบรรยากาศอบอุ่น มีน้องแมวคอยเดินให้กำลังใจในการทานอาหาร
ข้าวผัดมันเนื้อหอมมันเนื้อมาก กินกับเนื้อเข้ากันพอดีเลย
ไวน์รสชาติดี เพลงดี ในร้านไม่ได้กว้างมาก แต่ก็ไม่ได้แคบไป เหมาะสำหรับแกงค์เพื่อนนั่งเม้าท์มอย หรือคู่รักมาเดทกัน อาหารราคาดีมากคุ้มค่า

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
A lowkey spot that is easy to miss if you're not looking for it. The ambience is super chill, and the jazz music enhances that vibe.

We ordered both the beef and pork fried rice. The beef was excellent, you can taste the quality and it's cooked to perfection. The pork had more seasoning and was a generous portion size. We were highly satisfied with both dishes.

One thing to note: the menu is only available via QR code, so make sure your data is topped up before you go.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: ...เป็นร้านอาหารที่มีกาแฟ และเน้นพวกสเต๊กเนื้อ  เป็นร้านขนาดไม่ใหญ่มาก อาหารออกเร็ว แอร์เย็นฉ่ำ เสต๊กเนื้อราดข้าวอร่อยครับ...

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
They get a kitty in the house!😻
Love this cozy space. All the decorations are so cute.
Fantastic steak and rice!
Harsh brown and the truffle sauce make the perfect combination 🌟🪄

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: ร้านตกแต่งน่ารัก โฮมมี่มากๆ อาหารโดยรวมรสชาติดี แต่เนื้อสเต็กบางชิ้นแอบเหนียวไปนิดหน่อย

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
Why this place has no 5 starts I cannot understand.

Perfect meat, rice and seasoning. One of the best I ever had.

Natural wine, perfect ambiance.

Definitely coming back

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: What a lovely place! Came here because of a friend's recommendation and I'm happy I did! Ordered their steak rice bowl (forgot what it's called) and found it pretty worth the price. I also ordered a drink and it was delicious. You order via QR code which made the whole thing convenient and contact-free for the most part. Obviously the cat was the highlight.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: A small, cozy cafe with four tables in the 80s American style. There's always good music, and they have a cat. High-quality steaks at a fair price. Friendly owners. At the moment, this is my favorite place with steaks in the city.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: อร่อยมากๆๆๆ เมนูเนื้อคือดีมากๆ วาซาบิดองถึงใจมาก ไข่ดองก็อร่อยยย

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
No parking lot.
Recommend to make a reservation if for dinner.
For lunch is fine to Walking.
There are cats around the store if some one allergic please take a note.
The service is fine.
Order and pay first at the counter.
The signature Menu is Australia beef streak 200 grams for 390 baht.
The texture of beef is find but I order medium rare the beef cooked like medium well. But the taste is reasonable with this price.
The beef rice has good taste too.
The store has good vibe. The decoration if cozy with LP player in store.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: One of our go to spots for lunch in Chiang Mai. Incredible steak on rice, and lovely atmosphere. Owners are sweet and have great taste in music and decoration and interior design. We bought there 2026 Calender so we can bring the memory of them and their cats back to Amsterdam.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: We were only there to share a plate of beef fried rice. It was not top quality beef but for 190 baht, it was so flavourful and delicious, especially the rice itself. Will definitely come back and other dishes. Resident cat was cute, with very friendly staff.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
ร้านเล็กๆที่อาหารไม่เล็กเลย
steak เนื้อที่ไม่แพงเลย รู้สึกไปทีไรแล้วอิ่มทั้งใจและกายตลอด ไม่ต้องลุ้นเรื่องรสชาติและการย่างเนื้อเลย เพราะไปทีไร รสชาติเดิมไม่เปลี่ยน เรื่องเดียวที่อาจจะต้องลุ้นหน่อย คือ จะหมดก่อนมั้ย จะมีโต๊ะรึเปล่า แต่เค้าให้จองโต๊ะล่วงหน้าได้นะ

เมนูที่ชอบทานมากๆคือ ข้าวผัดมันเนื้อ คู่กับ สเต๊กเนื้อที่เค้าคัดเนื้อมาอย่างดีในราคาย่อมเยาว์มากๆ

ซีซ่าสลัดก็ดี และเค้าไม่ได้พรีเซนต์ว่าตัวเองเป็นร้านขนม แต่บอกเลย ขนมอร่อยทุกตัวที่ร้านทำ ลุ้นด้วยนะว่าแต่ละครั้งขนมจะเป็นขนมอะไร

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
Located near Maya mall, this little shop specialises in beef.
Tried their beef fat fried rice with sliced beef.
Rice was rich and flavourful. Beef was very tender as well. Definitely worth the price.
Very limited seats so come at the off hours.
They also have a cute resident cat.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
You have soooo many great restaurants in Chiang Mai but....there is only one Uncle Kani!

The food is so ridiculously good... Every single dish is cooked to perfection. They understand flavors here.

Add the fuzzy jazzy vinyl-vibe, the house-cats, the service.

Put this place on your Chiang Mai bucket list!

Wait what....can I only give 5stars!!!??😆

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
Pets friendly. Owners are so helpful and friendly.
Beef bowl with egg and Caesar salad are excellent!

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
สไตล์ร้านแบบมินิมอล มีน้องแมวลายสลิดประจำร้าน เข้าไปนั่งแล้วเจ้าของร้านจะให้สั่งผ่าน QR codea

เมนูข้าวผัดกระเทียม : หอมเนย คลุกข้าวทั่วถึง ไม่แห้งหรือแฉะเกิน

เมนู Fig Ricotta chesse salad : หวาน มัน และเปรี้ยวนิดๆอย่างลงตัว

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: If you are looking for a good steakhouse in Chiang Mai, I highly recommend this restaurant as a top choice.😋

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
สเต็กอร่อย ไข่ดอง คือ ดีมาก
รออาหารนานนิดนึง แต่ รสชาติคุ้มค่ากับที่รอคอย

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: ร้านเล็กๆแต่คุณภาพไม่เล็กตาม เป็นร้านกาแฟแต่มีเมนูอาหารที่น่าสนใจไม่แพ้กาแฟเช่นกัน ร้านนี้ถ้าจะมาลองแล้วขอแนะนำ พลาดไม่ได้!! “Beef fat fried rice + Beef steak ( ข้าวผัดมันเนื้อ + เนื้อสเต็ก ) “ เป็นสิ่งที่ควรสั่งเมื่อมาร้านนี้เป็นเมนูแรก ที่จอดรถอาจจะมีน้อย( ริมทางแถวนั้น ) บรรยากาศคือร้านกาแฟเลย มีเครื่องเล่นแผ่นเสียง สร้างบรรยากาศให้เหมือนคุณหลุดออกมาอยู่อีกที่นึ่ง ร้านมีความสงบสูง เหมาะแก่การหลีกหนีความวุ่นวายเพื่อมาสัมผัสอาหารและเครื่องดื่มอร่อยๆในบรรยากาศความสงบ .

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: ร้านน่ารักมากครับ atmosphere ดี อาหารดี เนื้อดี มีแมวคอยให้บริการ <3

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
Walk in เข้าไปได้ หรือจะจองก่อน1วันทางfacebook

อาหารอร่อย เสต็กเนื้อคุณภาพดี นุ่มไม่เหนียว
hash brown ทอดมาดีมาพร้อมซอสทรัฟเฟิล
ข้าวผัดมันเนื้อ หอมกระทะ หอมเนื้อมากค่ะ
แนะนำต้องสั่งไข่ดอง กินกับข้าวและเนื้อเข้ากันมากๆ

ร้านตกแต่งน่ารักดีค่ะ มีน้องแมวนอนหลับอยู่ด้วย 😊

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: ข้าวผัดหมูย่างในรูปอร่อยมาก ส่วนแมวนั่นก็น่ารัก

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
I do not love being forced to read the menu on my phone, and sending an order to the kitchen without being able to talk to anyone.
That said, everything was delightful
Except there’s no place to park nearby, so you have to take a Grab to get there – if they can find it  😥

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: Found this place near our hotel. We had the beef fat fried rice + beef steak, the portion is on the small side but delicious. The caramel custard cheese cake was also good, never had something like this before 😋. Will come back to try other dishes 😊

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: I've been here since they were open their business and continue coming back due to very nice food! If you love beef please come and try! The beef and veggie is so FRESH! You should eat it right after they served. And the owner and staff are very friendly and very helpful~! Even this place is a bit small but they didn't build it from the beginning right? In trading with good food, the sizing of the shop is not a big matter to me at all. Also i love their decoration here ♥️ wooden and vintage! You can see that all of the furnitures were handpicked. I would recommend my friends to come here and enjoy the food. Ignore some useless review it's reflecting their own behavior.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: Cute little place that serves coffee as well as coffee and wine too. We loved the decoration and enjoyed  Steak the cat’s presence. We ordered the fried rice and added our own choice of beef (thai, australia; the thai beef was a bit too chewy so do yourself a favor pay the extra 100 baht for not ruining your teeth🥲)

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
บรรยากาศร้านดี ตกแต่งสวยมากๆ เป็นร้านเล็กๆ เท่าที่อ่านรีวิวมา หลายคนบอกว่าเหมาะกับการมาเดท ซึ่งทางนี้อาจจะซวยที่เจอเพื่อนข้างโต๊ะเสียงดังไม่เกรงใจใคร (เสียงดังแบบดังมากๆ หัวเราะ ตะโกนคุยกันเหมือนคนหูตึง ) ก็เลยรู้สึกเฟลมากๆ เพราะตั้งใจไปดินเนอร์กับแฟน
เราสั่งไป 2 เมนูคือ
1. ข้าวผัดมันเนื้อ+เนื้อย่าง : เนื้อค่อนข้างเหนียว
2. ข้าวผัดกระเทียม+หมูย่าง : หมูแห้งๆแข็งๆ
ตัวข้าวผัดมันเนื้อกับข้าวผัดกระเทียมค่อนข้างเค็ม ถ้าสั่งไข่ดองเพิ่มอย่าเทลงไปกับข้าวเด็ดขาดเลยนะคะ เรื่องการทำและเสิร์ฟอาหาร ไม่รู้ว่ากระบวนการเป็นยังไง เราออร์เดอร์ไปก่อนที่จะมีอีกโต๊ะเข้ามาสักพักใหญ่ๆ แต่เขาได้ก่อน ซึ่งไม่ใช่การโทรจองมาก่อนแน่ๆ เพราะว่าเห็นเขาแสกนสั่งจากโต๊ะ และได้ยินเขาถามกันว่าจะกินอะไร โดยรวมเลยไม่ค่อยประทับใจเท่าไหร่

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
The taste was amazing. The menu is very small and adequate. The beef was soft and the egg was amazing.

However, I feel it was a bit overpriced for the quantity.

The restaurant itself is tiny with not a lot of seating options. But I think it’s fine.

I came in alone to have my dinner and the owners gave me their kitty for company.

Overall loved it. Would visit again if not for the price.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
ข้าวผัดมันเนื้อ หน้าเนื้อ อร่อยมาก

มาในขนาดพอดี ๆ ราคาโอเค 190.-

เนื้ออร่อยยย สุกกำลังดี ไม่เหนียว ไม่มีกลิ่น
ละมุนมากกก แฮปปี้สุดๆๆๆ แนะนำๆ มาลองกันได้ติดใจจจ ไข่ดองทำมาได้ดีด้วย

ไว้จะกลับมากินอีก อ่อ ที่จอดรถคือริมทางหน้าร้านน้า อยู่ใกล้นิมมาน แต่เดินอาจไม่ไหวเท่าไหร่ เรียกรถมาส่งดีกว่า

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
I was recommended this steakhouse by a friend, who said the Thai Striploin was the best. He was probably right because when I arrived, the Thai Striploin was already sold out. So, I decided to try the Beef Fat Fried Rice with Beef Steak (190 THB), and it was absolutely delicious! The rice was stir-fried with beef fat, giving it an amazing aroma that really whetted my appetite. I look forward to trying the Thai Striploin next time!

Mar 5, 2025

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: ร้านเล็กๆใต้หอพัก มีโต๊ะไม่กี่ตัว สั่งอาหารพร้อมจ่ายเงิน  ราคาค่อนข้างแพงเมื่อเทียบกับปริมาณและคุณภาพ   ข้าวหน้าเนื้อ(พนักงานเรียกแบบนี้) ไม่หอมมันเนื้อ  เนื้อได้น้อย ไข่ดองต้องจ่ายเพิ่ม

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
Delicious food and cozy yet elegant decor - hidden gem of Chiang Mai that deserves all the praise.

We loved everything: seriously good ribeye (folks really know their steak here), delicious beef fat fried rice, paired with decent Shiraz in an intimate atmosphere (only a handful tables on site, so book ahead or be lucky like we were!). We will definitely be back.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: อาหารอร่อย เพลงดีแต่งร้านมีคลาส น้องแมวน่ารักราคาเป็นมิตร แต่แนะนำให้จองไปหน่อยนะคับ เจ้าของร้านจะได้สต็อคให้พอจำนวนความต้องการของลูกค้า

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
Hands down my favorite ribeye in town. From seasoning, sear and overall flavour. Note this is a small and cozy place with just 5 tables and the restaurant closes at 8pm (sometimes a little earlier). There is no service interaction, you order from qr code and food is delivered. 90% of the time there is no employee in the guest area. So, it's the perfect place for introverts:)
Highly recommend. Make sure to book in advance.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: Best steak and other yum yum food in Chiang Mai

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
- Arrived at the restaurant just before closing, thankfully not many people were there, no queue at all. Extremely lucky, and big thanks to the restaurant for welcoming customers even in the last 30 minutes. Very kind indeed.
- Ordered the signature dish, beef fried rice with pickled eggs. The taste was deliciously balanced, flavorful beef, perfectly cooked, and the egg complemented it wonderfully. The seasoned rice was also delightful.
- Truly impressed, not just because of the fantastic food but also the excellent service. A highly enjoyable experience, definitely looking forward to coming back many more times.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: Cute little place to satisfy your beef cravings. Dont expect a full service type restaurant, it’s run by a lovely couple and they have streamlined the service to its essentials only. Come in for beef and go. Food is worth it. Highly recommend for your daily beef fix.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: มีแมวน่ารัก เมนูข้าวผัดเนื้อไข่ดอง และพาม่าแฮมกับมะม่วงเข้ากันสุดๆ แนะนำเลยครับ

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: สั่งข้าวผัดมันเนื้อ+เนื้อย่าง และไข่ดองโชยุ เนื้อย่างน่ะดีมากๆ สุกแบบ medium ตามที่บอกไป ตัวข้าวผัดมันเนื้อรสชาติเข้มข้น ร้านบรรยากาศดีมาก เปิดเพลงเพราะ จัดร้านได้สวยน่านั่งมาก

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: Amazing steak in chiang mai! Came here for a special dinner to celebrate our 9 year anniversary and it didn’t disappoint. Highly recommend

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
Recently visited this restaurant and ordered medium-rare strip loins. However, as the pictures will show, the steak was almost well-done and very chewy. The service was lacking; you simply walk in, sit down, and scan to order. Drink wasn’t served until the steak was ready.

There was no interaction between the staff and customers.

Overall, I was quite unimpressed.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
Food here is incredible, the steak and beef fried rice is phenomenal!

And as a British person I was shocked there Cumberland sausages are better than in the UK.

Great little restaurant!

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text:
New shop in town.
Beef fatty + garlic fried japanese rice + beef steak. Salmon steak. Caesars salad. Premium ingredients.

Marinate egg yolk with garlic and soy sauce is the best.

Service is good. Price is quite steep. No parking space. Cleanliness 5/5

**Reservation need. Very crowded on the weekend.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: Cozy venue with a specialized menu with delicious and sophisticated dishes prepared with fresh ingredients and great attention to detail. It’s perfect for a weekend afternoon.

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: ชอบไส้กรอกกับน้ำจิ้มตัดเลี่ยนหอม truffle oil จะไปกินต้องทักเพจจองต่อวัน แซลมอน grilled ได้ดีสด ร้านแอบแคบนิดนึงช่วงเช้าเป็นคาเฟ่ต์ช่วงค่ำเป็นกับข้าวจานเนื้อต่างๆ ตัวเนื้อก็ดีสมกับราคาแต่เคยกินตอนเดลิเวอร์รี่จะหอมเนื้อกับกระเทียมย่างกว่านี้

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ
Review_Text: ร้านเล็กๆน่ารัก หาที่จอดรถยากนิดนึงนะคะ แต่คุ้มค่าที่ได้มาทานค่ะ ลูกค้าท่านอื่นใจเย็นๆหน่อยนะคะ เพราะทางร้าน มีแค่คนดูแลแค่2 คนเองค่ะ มีเจ้าของร้าน คอยต้อนรับอยู่ที่เบาะนอน อาหารอร่อยถูกปากมาก  มีทั้งชากาแฟ และแอล ด้วยนะคะ แนะนำ จองก่อนเข้าไปทานนะคะ ^^

Restaurant_Name: อังเคิลคานิ

คุณภาพถือว่าเกินราคา เพราะใช้ของสดใหม่ ทำจานต่อจาน อร่อยและสะอาดทุกเมนูเลยค่ะ
เจ้าของร้านก็เป็นกันเองและใจดีมาก ทานตั้งแต่มหาลัย-ทำงานเลยค่ะ พอทานที่นี่แล้วก็จะไม่อยากไปทานร้านอื่นอีกเลยค่ะ เพราะราคาจับต้องได้ทุกวัยจริงๆ พาพ่อแม่มาทานก็บอกอร่อย😊

Restaurant_Name: โบตั๋น อาหารญี่ปุ่น
Review_Text:
ร้านอาหารญี่ปุ่นสไตล์บ้านๆ แต่คุณภาพสูงทั้งวัตถุดิบและรสชาติ สวนทางกับราคาเลย จ่ายได้สบายกระเป๋า
มาทานที่นี้ประจำ ไม่ค่อยจะไปร้านอื่นซักเท่าไหร่ ติดใจรสของซุปมิโซะ ถูกปากมาก ไม่เหมือนใคร
ปลาหมึกย่างซีอิ๊วกับซูชิเซ็ตนี่เป็นของที่สั่งตลอดทุกครั้งที่มา
คนอื่นเป็นยังไงไม่รู้ แต่นี่คือร้านที่ผมเลือก หากคิดถึงอาหารญี่ปุ่น

มาช่วงค่ำระวังยุงนิดนึง พกสเปรย์กันยุงมาด้วย เท่านี้ก็เพลิดเพลินกับมื้ออหารได้สบายๆแล้ว

Restaurant_Name: โบตั๋น อาหารญี่ปุ่น
Review_Text:
I am (pleasantly!) shocked to find and try this place. I "heard" about it via "AK" on Google Maps.

The prices were quite good, but the food was phenomenal (especially when taking price into account).

We ordered gyoza 50B to start followed by a sushi set ~135B and the tempura soba 70B. We foolishly ordered an okonomiyaki midway through the meal (foolishly bc we ended up being stuffed!).

All four items were delicious, but I think the standouts were the tempura soba and the sushi set. The shrimp tempura and the noodles themselves were perfect for me. While the soup didn't have a ton of flavor, the dish itself was tasty. As far as the sushi set, while the fish was great, it was the rice that really impressed me. Often rice (outside of Japan) is overlooked as an afterthought. Here, it was both warm and so flavorful.

I plan on returning for lunch (and more dinners) to eat more soba and sushi. The gyoza and okonomiyaki also make for the perfect otsumami/anju if you just want to snack with some ice cold Leos/Singhas.

Review_Text: Surprisingly decent Japanese food in a very local area and local looking store. This place is known among Japanese retirees in Chiang Mai and they are regulars as well. I especially liked hot tempura soba. It was very authentic and tasted great. Pancake and gyoza were also good.

Restaurant_Name: โบตั๋น อาหารญี่ปุ่น
Review_Text:
Being served sashimi and eating with chopsticks was a new and daunting experience for me, but we practiced hard at home so as not to embarrass ourselves and we were rewarded with a delicious, fresh meal that - mostly - ended up in our mouths.

The chefs certainly don't compromise on quality, although perhaps the low-cost can be explained by the rather small portions. A shared large sashimi is not really much more filling than a starter. The seating is rather rudimentary - I think our table took up some of the car-park - but it has a local charm. Staff aren't unfriendly but I wouldn't describe them as friendly either. I was hoping to exchange some Japanese but they're all Thai.

I probably won't go back, but that's largely down to there being so much choice in the area.

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text: ร้านสะอาด บรรยากาศดี พี่ที่ร้านให้คำแนะนำเรื่องอาหารได้ดีค่ะ สั่งข้าวหน้าเนื้อขั้วตับมา ได้มาค่อนข้างไวมาก เนื้อก็ไม่เหนียวเกิน แต่ติดจะแห้งไปหน่อย กินกับน้ำจิ้มแจ่ว เหมาะกับคนชอบรสชาติอาหารไทย ของเพื่อนสั่งรีซอตโต้ ข้าวก็อร่อย หอม มันกำลังดี มีเนิ้อให้เลือกเยอะสำหรับคนที่อยากท่นสเต็ก

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text:
A hidden gem in Ninam, nice decor and comfy seating. Service is top notch. They serve many types of draft beer,nice ambience to dine in.Also specialized in Thai Wagyu beef
The Wagyu beef salad and strip loin are done to perfection with delicious sauces and sides. The Thai beef is as good as any steak I tasted We have a great time here.
Don't miss this if you are in neighborhood.
We will be back. Corkage for wine is 200 baths per bottle which is very reasonable.

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text: เป็นร้านสำหรับคนทานเนื้อวัวโดยเฉพาะ ไม่มีหมู เมนูหลากหลาย อร่อย สะอาด สายดื่มก็มีทางเลือกให้ และที่สำคัญราคาเป็นมิตรจนน่าตกใจ เซอร์ไพร้มากเพราะเป็นการสุ่มไปทาน และติดใจเลย มีอีก 1 สาขาที่สีลม กทม. ร้านอยู่ตรงข้ามนิมมาน ที่นั่งอาจจะค่อนข้างพอดีตัว ไม่ได้มีพื้นที่กว้างขวางมาก มีห้องน้ำในร้าน ดีสะอาด โดยรวมคือพอใจมากค่ะ สั่งอาหารมา 6 อย่าง ราคาโดยประมาณ 1,000 บาท ราคาดีมากๆค่ะ

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text:
This is easily my worst dining experience in Thailand. Firstly, we were upsold an expensive Wagyu steak at a cost of 1669 baht for 390 grams. I am sure it said 1500 when it was presented. Worse, we were told we could choose two sides as shown, so selected mixed vegetables and chips. When the steak eventually arrived, it was already cold but there were no seperate fries or vegetables as pictured, so we assumed they were coming. After 10 minutes I went downstairs to ask about the fries and vegetables. They told me the vegetables were on the side and a tiny portion of mashed potatoe was the other side (pictured). I complained and the waitress basically just said those are your vegetables, sorry.

The only good thing I can say about this was the steak was tasty, although probably cooked more rare than medium rare.

A 160 baht cooking charge was also added to the bill? Was I supposed to cook it myself?

Honestly I've never felt so ripped off in my life.

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text: เมนูส่วนใหญ่ของทางร้านจะเน้นเป็นเนื้อวัว สั่งตัวรีซอตโต้หน้าเนื้อวากิวขั้วตับ รีซอตโตรสชาติกำลังดี ไม่ค่อยเลี่ยนเลยค่ะ รุ้สึกว่าเนื้ออาจจะกริลแห้งไปนิดหน่อย แต่โดยรวมไม่ได้เหนียวค่ะ น้ำผลไม้สดเป็นผลไม้คั้นสดจริง อร่อยมากค่ะ

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text: แนะนำเลยค่ะสำหรับสายเนื้อ ที่ร้านมีให้เลือกเยอะ ทำออกมารสชาติและเนื้อสัมผัสดีเลยค่ะ อร่อยถูกปาก มีหลายเมนู ทั้งเครื่องดื่มแล้วก็อาหาร พี่ๆที่ร้านเป็นกันเองมากค่ะ สามารถจอดรถบริเวณข้างร้านได้ ไว้มีโอกาสจะมาทานอีกนะคะ

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text: อาหารอร่อย เมนูเยอะมาก เด็ดอร่อย สายเนื้อห้ามพลาด สเต๊กเนื้อA6 นุ่มติดมัน, ไขกระดูกวัวใครชอบกินมันๆคือฟินมากกินคู่กับขนมปังลาบเนื้อ สปาเก็ตตี้พริกแห้งมันเนื้อก็ดี ข้าวผัดมันเนื้อหอมมากกินกับน้ำปลาพริกเด็ดเลยจร้า

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

The best steak we’ve had in Thailand!
Beautifully marbled, super soft, and melts in the mouth  almost like wagyu. The mashed potatoes were buttery and delicious, and the salad was fresh and light.

The staff were extremely friendly and helpful, and the atmosphere was calm and pleasant.
A bit pricey, but absolutely worth it.
We’ll definitely come back!

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text:
Firstly,
good selection of meat and atmosphere.

However,
Steak served cold.
Steak not cooked as per their own images of Steak Level. ( eg,  Med Rare steak was close to Blue in parts)

Partner returned to be cooked correctly. this time came back warm.

For the price and a specialist place, the basics should not be happening.

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text:
Menu on the menu book looks good but quite disappointed by the real plate coming. The small portion is acceptable but the quality is unacceptable.

Especially the ‘Grilled brisket Thai herb sauce’, even though I knew it was quite a fat menu but still cannot eat half of the plate with most of the meat coming is so oily fat. Try to tell them politely to change but they said it is what it is…. (Not quite same as in the picture)

So maybe I ordered the wrong menu. But hope them can do much better for this in the future.

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text: Nice steak reataurant in Chingmai with reasonable price. This place serve Thai-Wagyu breed ,which quite nice. You can select your meat from the fridge and you can let them cook for you.

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text:
This was the best steak I've had in a long time. Picked it out of the freezer, cooked perfectly, and the sides were good. Had the hefeweizen on tap, also very good. I will be back next time I'm in chiang mai.
It's more expensive to pick it out, next time I would try what they have to just order. This was a special treat.

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text:
50 eur steak in Chiang Mai?
4 stars for its inviting rustic vibe and kind host. The Thai Wagyu steak was tender and good, but average in flavor—pricy at 1850 THB for Thailand, with upsell pressure. Worth it for quality beef seekers; stick to basics for value.

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text: I’m not sure whether I just got a bad cut of meat or if the steak quality here is generally poor, which surprised me because the restaurant has a 4.5 rating on Google. My steak was very dry: honestly one of the worst I’ve had, in both North America and Thailand. It makes me wonder how this place is rated so highly. I’ve lived in Nimman for a while, and for a really good steak, Uncle Kani is still the best in my experience.

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text: เนื้อนุ่ม ฉ่ำ ละมุน อาหารไทยรสชาติอร่อย กลมกล่อมอาหารต่างชาติไม่เลี่ยนจนเกินไป ผักสดกรอบ คุณลุงที่ร้านใจดีมากกก เทคแคร์ลูกค้าดีมากกก เป็นกันเอง และราคาอาหารไม่แรงมาก

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text: อาหารราคาไม่แรงเลย สำหรับสายเนื้อคือราคาดีมากเลยค่ะ มีให้เราเลือกได้อบ่างหลากหลายเลยค่ะ และอร่อยมากเลยค่ะ พี่พนักงานแนะนำดีมากเลน ใจดีและบริการดี

Review_Text: Butcher Steak is one of my favorite places in Chiang Mai for a good meal. The food is delicious, the vibe is cozy, and the service is great. Jackie is always so welcoming and funny, which makes the whole experience even better. I always leave happy and satisfied.

Restaurant_Name: Fresh Harvest Farm Chiang Mai
Review_Text: The steak was amazing, the whole meal was! So tender and melt in your mouth. Will definitely make the trip back just to have this again!

Review_Text:
